scripted_trigger winged_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	OR = {
		ai_energy >= 0
		ai_zeal >= 0
		ai_honor >= 0
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.3007 = {
	type = character_event
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 5
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					NOT = {
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_1
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = improved_winged_knight
		}
		send_interface_message = {
			type = msg_marshal_task_good
			title = agot_winged_knight.3007.notification
			desc = agot_winged_knight.3007.desc
			tooltip = task_train_commanders_notification_tooltip
			left_icon = scope:improved_winged_knight
			scope:improved_winged_knight = {
				agot_prowess_rank_up_effect = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

##########
# Training for KG asks to join and can hang out at court until there's a space - Balon Swann
# Badger
#########
agot_winged_knight.3008 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3008.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3008.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:candidate
		animation = personality_vengeful
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:sponsor
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	trigger = {
		#add in KG can be reassigned law when online
		any_councillor = {
			exists = yes
		}
		any_living_character = {
			is_available_ai_adult = yes
			top_liege = root
			has_trait = refusing_marriage
			has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
			NOT = {
				is_courtier_of = root
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_living_character = {
			limit = {
				is_available_ai_adult = yes
				top_liege = root
				has_trait = refusing_marriage
				has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
				NOT = {
					is_courtier_of = root
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = candidate
		}
		random_councillor = {
			save_scope_as = sponsor
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			#Make him worth having
			scope:candidate = {
				agot_prowess_rank_up_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
						}
					}
					blademaster_lifestyle_rank_up_effect = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3008.a
		custom_tooltip = agot_winged_knight.3008.agot_winged_knight.tt
		trigger = {
			AND = {
				OR = {
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_1
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_2
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_3
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_4
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_5
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_6
					}
				}
				any_living_winged_knight = {
					#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
					top_liege = root
					count < 3
				}
			}
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:candidate
		add_hook = {
			type = loyalty_hook
			target = scope:candidate
		}
		scope:candidate = {
			save_scope_as = winged_knight_candidate
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1006
		}
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				opinion = 10
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				add_hook = {
					type = loyalty_hook
					target = scope:candidate
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1008
		ai_chance = {
			#why not its cool
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		#You may wait until a space opens up
		name = agot_winged_knight.3005.b
		custom_tooltip = agot_winged_knight.3008.b.tt
		scope:candidate = {
			#Rare event so should be okay to have him wandering around? Revisit
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:candidate
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Piss off
		name = agot_winged_knight.3008.c
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain		#get dunked on
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
		}
		scope:candidate = {
			#Rare event so should be okay to have him wandering around? Revisit
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -50
			}
			remove_trait = refusing_marriage
			remove_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kinsgguard training hard gains strong/athletic
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger winged_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		has_trait = strong
		has_trait = athletic
		has_trait = gout_ridden
		has_trait = clubfooted
	}
	ai_energy >= low_positive_energy	#15 No lazy bois
}

agot_winged_knight.3010 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3010.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3010.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:strong_winged_knight
		animation = wrestling_victory
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = throne_room_applaud_1
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = strong_winged_knight
			add_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
			random_list = {
				60 = {
					add_trait = strong
				}
				40 = {
					add_trait = athletic
				}
			}
			add_character_modifier = {
				modifier = brawny_modifier
				years = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3010.a
	}
	after = {
		scope:strong_winged_knight = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
		}
	}
}

# A Challenger approaches !
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger winged_knight_3011_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	NOT = { has_council_position = winged_knight_lord_commander }
	OR = {
		has_trait = craven
		has_trait = lazy
		prowess < 20
	}
}

scripted_trigger winged_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = {
	top_liege = root
	is_available_ai_adult = yes
	has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
	prowess >= 20
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	OR = {
		ai_boldness >= medium_positive_boldness		#25
		ai_rationality <= medium_negative_rationality		# -25
		ai_vengefulness >= high_positive_vengefulness		#50
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.3011 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3011.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3011.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
		animation = personality_dishonorable
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:challenger
		animation = anger
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3011_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
		any_living_character = {
			winged_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3011_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = unworthy_winged_knight
		}
		random_living_character = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = challenger
			add_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
		add_character_flag = replacing_winged_knight
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3011.a
		scope:challenger = {
			duel = {
				target = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
				skill = prowess
				50 = {
					#challenger wins
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = 2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:unworthy_winged_knight = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:challenger
						}
					}
					root = {
						save_scope_as = king
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						save_scope_as = winged_knight_candidate
					}
					scope:king = {
						add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_candidate
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_winged_knight.1008
							days = 1
						}
					}
					scope:winged_knight_candidate = {
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_winged_knight.1006
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_winged_knight.3011.a.challenger.toast
							left_icon = scope:challenger
							right_icon = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
							scope:challenger = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
				50 = {
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = -2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_winged_knight.3011.a.unworthy_winged_knight.toast
							left_icon = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
							right_icon = scope:challenger
							scope:unworthy_winged_knight = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3011.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:unworthy_winged_knight
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3011.c
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		imprison_character_effect = {
			TARGET = scope:challenger
			IMPRISONER = root
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_winged_knight
			}
			remove_character_flag = replacing_winged_knight
		}
		scope:challenger = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
	}
}

##########
# The Dream is Dead! Bad character training for KG is told to get a real job
# Badger
#########
agot_winged_knight.3012 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3012.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3012.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:failed_winged_knight
		animation = shame
	}
	trigger = {
		scope:failed_winged_knight = {
			AND = {
				prowess < 15				#Bad at swordies
				NOR = {
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_2
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
				}
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		top_liege = { save_scope_as = ruler }
	}
	option = {
		#Get a Real job!
		name = agot_winged_knight.3012.a
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_winged_knight
			modifier = hurt_opinion
			opinion = -25
		}
		set_relation_potential_rival = scope:failed_winged_knight
		scope:failed_winged_knight = {
			remove_trait = refusing_marriage
			remove_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
			add_stress = medium_stress_gain
			random_list = {
				70 = {
				}
				30 = {
					add_trait = depressed_1
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
		}
	}
	option = {
		#How about a different order? - Send to Wall
		name = agot_winged_knight.3012.b
		trigger = {
			scope:failed_winged_knight = {
				agot_valid_potential_nw_member = yes
			}
		}
		agot_send_to_nightswatch_effect = {
			ACTOR = root
			NIGHTSWATCH_CANDIDATE = scope:failed_winged_knight
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
	}
	option = {
		#I'm sure you'll get better!
		name = agot_winged_knight.3012.c
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_winged_knight
			modifier = kindness_opinion
			opinion = 25
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
	}
}

# A Kingsguard is caught carousing especially hard!
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger winged_knight_3013_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = gluttonous
		has_trait = drunkard
		has_trait = gregarious
		has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.3013 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3013.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3013.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:drunken_winged_knight
		animation = toast_goblet
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3013_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3013_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = drunken_winged_knight
		}
		scope:drunken_winged_knight = {
			reveler_lifestyle_rank_up_check_effect = yes
			random_list = {
				50 = {
				}
				50 = {
					add_trait = drunkard
					modifier = {
						factor = 5
						has_character_modifier = patron_drunken_god_modifier
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3013.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:drunken_winged_knight = {
					has_trait = drunkard
				}
			}
			scope:drunken_winged_knight = {
				remove_trait = drunkard
			}
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_gain
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_winged_knight
			modifier = annoyed_opinion
			opinion = -30
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_trait = gluttonous
					has_trait = drunkard
					has_trait = gregarious
					has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3013.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:drunken_winged_knight
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:drunken_winged_knight
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_winged_knight = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_winged_knight
			modifier = pleased_opinion
			opinion = 15
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3013.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_trait = gluttonous
				has_trait = drunkard
				has_trait = gregarious
				has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_winged_knight = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_loss
		progress_towards_friend_effect = {
			REASON = friend_drinking_buddies
			CHARACTER = scope:drunken_winged_knight
			OPINION = default_friend_opinion
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kingsguard Gains Blademaster
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger winged_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	NOR = {
		AND = {
			has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			has_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value >= 100
			}
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = hunter GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = falconer GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
	}
	ai_energy >= 0	#Has to be going out doing things
}

agot_winged_knight.3014 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3014.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3014.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = army_camp

	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lifestyle_winged_knight
		animation = wooden_sword_coup_degrace
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = blademaster_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_winged_knight
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3014.a
		scope:lifestyle_winged_knight = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			}
			add_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value = {
					integer_range = {
						min = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_low
						max = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_high
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3015.t

	override_background = {
		reference = wilderness_forest
	}

		character = scope:lifestyle_winged_knight
		animation = hunting_longbow_aim_arrow_default
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = hunting_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_winged_knight
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3015.a
		scope:lifestyle_winged_knight = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_hunter
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_hunter
			}
			add_random_tiered_trait_track_xp_effect = {
				TRAIT = lifestyle_hunter
				TRACK = hunter
				LEVEL_1 = yes
				LEVEL_3 = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

################################
# AI Kingsguard Maintenance Events
# 9001 - 9999
# by Badger
################################
agot_winged_knight.9000 = {
	#Big Maintenance Check
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		ruler_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
		any_living_winged_knight = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_lord_commander
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_6
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_1
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_2
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_3
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_4
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_5
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:winged_knight_6
					}
				}
			}
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.9002
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
			}
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.9001
		}
	}
}

# AI Dead Lord Commander
agot_winged_knight.9001 = {
	# AI Dead Lord Commander
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_1
			}
			cp:winged_knight_1 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_2
			}
			cp:winged_knight_2 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_3
			}
			cp:winged_knight_3 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_4
			}
			cp:winged_knight_4 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_5
			}
			cp:winged_knight_5 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_6
			}
			cp:winged_knight_6 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = lord_commander_candidates
			order_by = {
				value = 0
				max = 1
				add = {
					value = prowess
					multiply = 2
				}
				if = {
					#Extra for important lordly fams
					limit = {
						any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
							is_landed = yes
							highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
						}
					}
					add = 20
				}
				# More Likely to pick a Lord Commander they like
				if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 80
						}
					}
					add = 40
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 50
						}
					}
					add = 30
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 30
						}
					}
					add = 15
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = new_lord_commander
		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:new_lord_commander = {
			add_character_flag = can_fire_winged_knight
		}
		fire_councillor = scope:new_lord_commander
		save_scope_as = king
		agot_assign_winged_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:new_lord_commander
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:new_lord_commander = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
			remove_character_flag = can_fire_winged_knight
		}
	}
}


scripted_trigger ai_kg_assignment_trigger = {
	prowess >= 15
	can_be_winged_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	has_trait = education_martial_prowess
	NOR = {
		has_trait = winged_knight
		any_heir_title = { #AI don't use primary heirs
			exists = this
			place_in_line_of_succession = {
				target = prev
				value == 1
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.9002 = {
	# Dead Kingsguard Member AI
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_6
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = king
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					can_be_winged_knight_trigger = {
						COURT_OWNER = scope:king
					}
					top_liege = root
					prowess >= 15 # don't assign complete shitters
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess # somebody with a sword trait for fuck sake
					NOR = {
						has_trait = winged_knight
						AND = {
							any_heir_title = { #AI don't use primary heirs
								exists = this
								place_in_line_of_succession = {
									target = prev
									value == 1
								}
							}
							NOT = { #Unless they're specifically training for the Kingsguard
								has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
							}
						}
					}
				}
				add_to_list = potential_winged_knight
			}
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_winged_knight
			limit = {
				can_be_winged_knight_trigger = {
					COURT_OWNER = scope:king
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					#Being good at swords
					add = {
						value = prowess
						multiply = 2
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#Grab cool traits plz
					OR = {
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
						has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
					}
					add = 50
				}
				modifier = { #Appoint your relatives who are training
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						this = root
					}
					has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
					add = 300
				}
				modifier = { #Appoint your spouse's relatives who are training
					trigger = { exists = root.primary_spouse }
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						this = root.primary_spouse
					}
					has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
					add = 300
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_empire
					}
					add = 200
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_kingdom
					}
					add = 150
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_duchy
					}
					add = 100
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_county
					}
					add = 50
				}
				opinion_modifier = {
					# More likely to pick someone they like
					opinion_target = root
					multiplier = 2
				}
				modifier = {
					#dont pick people you hate
					OR = {
						has_relation_rival = root
						has_relation_nemesis = root
						has_relation_potential_rival = root
					}
					factor = 0.1
				}
				modifier = {
					#Less chance of appointing heathens
					factor = 0.2
					NOT = {
						faith = root.faith
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#Prejudice against Lowborn - AI should prefer nobles
					factor = 0.1
					is_lowborn = yes
				}
				modifier = {
					# Dont appoint randoms when there's a trainee available
					factor = 0
					any_in_list = {
						list = potential_winged_knight
						has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
					}
					NOT = {
						has_character_modifier = training_for_winged_knight
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#if they can't be KG don't try and assign them stupid ass AI
					factor = 0
					NOT = {
						can_be_winged_knight_trigger = {
							COURT_OWNER = scope:king
						}
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winged_knight_candidate
		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:king = {
			add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_candidate
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1008
		}
		scope:winged_knight_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1006
		}
	}
}
agot_winged_knight.9003 = {
	# Stop moronic KG leaving
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		has_trait = winged_knight
		scope:old_employer = {
			is_landed = yes
			this = top_liege
			ruler_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
		}
		NOT = {
			has_character_flag = coming_home
		}
		NOT = { is_ruler = yes }
	}
	immediate = {
		scope:old_employer = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = winged_knight_candidate
		}
		scope:old_employer = {
			root = {
				add_character_flag = coming_home
			}
			add_courtier ?= root
			root = {
				remove_character_flag = coming_home
			}
		}
		scope:winged_knight_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1006
		}
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.9004 = {
	# Remove KG variables to prevent them rising from the grave if title is recreated
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		scope:landed_title = {
			title_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		scope:landed_title = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_1
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_2
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_3
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_4
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_5
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_6
				}
				remove_variable = winged_knight_6
			}
		}
		every_councillor = {
			limit = {
				is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
				has_trait = winged_knight
			}
			remove_trait = winged_knight
			agot_winged_knight_destroy_artifacts = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:landed_title = title:e_the_vale
				exists = title:d_winged_knight.holder
			}
			title:d_winged_knight.holder = {
				destroy_title = title:d_winged_knight
			}
		}
	}
}

	# Kingsguard on parole now get a job :)
	hidden = yes

			ruler_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
		}

		}
		root = {

		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:winged_knight_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.1006
		}
	}
}

#Grab lost winged_knight send them home
agot_winged_knight.9007 = {
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		ruler_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	}
	immediate = {
		random_held_title = {
			limit = {
				title_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = winged_knight_title
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
					is_alive = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
						NOT = {
							employer ?= root
							is_ruler = yes
						}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_lord_commander
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_lord_commander
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_1
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_1
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_1
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_2
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_2
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_2
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_3
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_3
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_3
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_4
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_4
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_4
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_5
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_5
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_5
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_6
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_6
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_6
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6
				}
			}
		}
		title:d_winged_knight.holder ?= {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_government = winged_knight_government } }
				change_government = winged_knight_government
			}
		}
		#Succession Display
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winged_knight_lord_commander
				cp:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = title:d_winged_knight
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_1
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_2
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_3
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_4
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_5
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title = {
						exists = var:winged_knight_6
					}
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
					add_to_list = winged_knight_successor
				}
			}
			ordered_in_list = {
				list = winged_knight_successor
				order_by = prowess
				max = 1
				save_scope_as = winged_knight_successor
			}
			cp:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
				set_designated_heir_unsafe = scope:winged_knight_successor
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.9008 = {
	# agot_on_title_gain_kingsguard = { # This only works if the previous owner has a title to fall back on, and thus, has a court
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		ruler_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	}

	immediate = {
		random_held_title = {
			limit = {
				title_has_winged_knight_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = winged_knight_title
		}
		if = { #Ensure Kingsguard title is a vassal
			limit = {
				has_title = title:e_the_vale
				NOT = { has_title = title:d_winged_knight }
				exists = title:d_winged_knight.holder
			}
			create_title_and_vassal_change = {
				type = swear_fealty
				save_scope_as = change
				add_claim_on_loss = no
			}
			title:d_winged_knight.holder = {
				change_liege = {
					liege = root
					change = scope:change
				}
			}
			resolve_title_and_vassal_change = scope:change
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
					is_alive = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
						is_ruler = no
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_lord_commander
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_lord_commander
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_lord_commander
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_1
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_1
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_1
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_1
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_2
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_2
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_2
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_2
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_3
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_3
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_3
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_3
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_4
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_4
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_4
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_4
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_5
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_5
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_5
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_5
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:winged_knight_title = {
					exists = var:winged_knight_6
				}
				scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6 = {
							has_council_position = winged_knight_6
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = winged_knight_6
					target = scope:winged_knight_title.var:winged_knight_6
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

scripted_effect kg_decision_list_builder = {
	scope:title_with_kg.var:winged_knight_$NUM$ ?= {
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_character_flag = agot_is_at_unknown_place }
			}
			add_to_list = kg_decision_list
		}
	}
}

agot_winged_knight.9100 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.9100.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.9100.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = scope:loser
	trigger = {
		scope:title_with_kg = {
			has_variable = {
				name = winged_knight_1
				name = winged_knight_2
				name = winged_knight_3
				name = winged_knight_4
				name = winged_knight_5
				name = winged_knight_6
				name = winged_knight_lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 1 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 2 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 3 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 4 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 5 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 6 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = lord_commander }
		add_character_flag = {
			flag = skip_kg_replacement_event_flag
			days = 14
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.9100.a
		trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.9101
	}
}
agot_winged_knight.9101 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.9101.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.9101.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:right_portrait_kg animation = beg
	}
	widget = {
		is_shown = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		gui = "agot_mw_kg_removal_selection"
		container = "custom_widgets_container"
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = no
			}
			every_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				root = {
					add_to_variable_list = {
						name = kg_decision_widget_list
						target = prev
					}
				}
			}
			random_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				save_scope_as = right_portrait_kg
			}
		}
		else = {
			ordered_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				order_by = "opinion(root)"
				save_scope_as = kg
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.9101.a
		trigger = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		every_in_list = {
			variable = kg_removes_list
			custom_tooltip = agot_winged_knight.9101.a_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				agot_remove_winged_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = this }
				root = {
					imprison = {
						target = prev
						type = dungeon
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.9101.b
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		agot_remove_winged_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:kg }
		imprison = {
			target = scope:kg
			type = dungeon
		}
		scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.9101.c
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		scope:kg = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = was_spared
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			opinion_modifier = {
				opinion_target = scope:kg
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = yes
			}
			scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
			if = {
				limit = {
					list_size:kg_decision_list > 0
				}
				clear_saved_scope = kg
				trigger_event = agot_winged_knight.9101
			}
		}
		else = {
			clear_variable_list = kg_removes_list
			clear_variable_list = kg_decision_widget_list
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Kingsguard is found dead outside a brothel! - Owen Bush
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger winged_knight_3017_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_winged_knight_trigger = yes
	is_male = yes #Can't cut off a penis that ain't there
	OR = { #Would visit a brothel
		has_trait = lustful
		has_trait = rakish
		#has_trait = lifestyle_reveler - makes sense but EVERYONE ends up with this stupid fucking trait somehow so makes the pool far too wide
	}
	NOR = {
		has_trait = celibate
		has_trait = chaste
		has_trait = eunuch
		has_trait = beardless_eunuch
	}
	ai_compassion <= high_negative_compassion #Cruel
}

agot_winged_knight.3017 = { # Reddit's favourite event
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winged_knight.3017.t
	desc = agot_winged_knight.3017.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:eunuch_winged_knight
		animation = poison
		outfit_tags = { no_clothes }
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			winged_knight_3017_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_winged_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				winged_knight_3017_winged_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = eunuch_winged_knight
		}
		scope:eunuch_winged_knight = {
			add_trait = eunuch_1
			death = {
				death_reason = death_suffocate_on_cock
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winged_knight.3017.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				capital_county.culture = { has_cultural_tradition = tradition_city_keepers }
			}
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = high_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = medium_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
##### GREEN KNIGHTS (Reach) #####
namespace = agot_green_knight

################################
# Kingsguard Maintenance and Appointment Events
# 1000 - 1999
# by Badger
################################

agot_green_knight.1000 = { #Kingsguard Death Maintenance Event
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			title:e_the_reach = {
				has_variable = kingslanding_exploding
			}
		}
		OR = {
			has_trait = green_knight
			has_council_position = green_knight_lord_commander
			has_council_position = green_knight_1
			has_council_position = green_knight_2
			has_council_position = green_knight_3
			has_council_position = green_knight_4
			has_council_position = green_knight_5
			has_council_position = green_knight_6
		}
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_green_knight_trigger = yes
		}
		NOT = { #surpress the notification in specific events
			top_liege = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_green_knight
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = dead_green_knight
		agot_remove_green_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:dead_green_knight }
	}
}

scripted_trigger new_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
scripted_trigger new_highborn_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		highborn_green_knight_candidate = yes
		can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
agot_green_knight.1001 = { # Standard KG Member Death / Removal
	type = character_event
	title = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.t
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1001.fallback.t
		}
	}
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1001.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = { # Comment on Prowess
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_green_knight
					scope:dead_green_knight.prowess >= 35
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.talented
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_green_knight
					scope:dead_green_knight.prowess >= 20
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.suitable
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_green_knight
					scope:dead_green_knight.prowess >= 10
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.passing
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_green_knight
					scope:dead_green_knight.prowess < 10
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.unsuitable
			}
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1001.desc.end
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1001.fallback.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
		reference = temple
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:king
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			animation = sadness
		}
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:removed_kg
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			animation = personality_zealous
		}
		animation = personality_cynical
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				scope:lord_commander = scope:removed_kg
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			play_music_cue = mx_cue_death
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_lord_commander
			}
			cp:green_knight_lord_commander = {
				save_scope_as = lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Greatest Knights in all the realm
		name = agot_green_knight.1001.a
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_green_knight.1001.a.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				OR = {
					any_vassal_or_below = {
						primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
						new_kg_trigger = yes
					}
					new_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_green_knight.1002
			days = { 10 20 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1001.a.tt
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Sons of Powerful Lords
		name = agot_green_knight.1001.b
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_green_knight.1001.b.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				any_vassal_or_below = {
					primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
					is_powerful_vassal = yes
					new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_green_knight.1003
			days = { 30 60 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1001.b.tt
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1001.c
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1001.c.tt
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1002 = { # Greatest Knights
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1002.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1002.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1002.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		desc = agot_green_knight.1002.desc.end
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:green_knight_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_6
			}
		}
		any_living_green_knight = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_green_knight
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:green_knight_lord_commander = {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20
				can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_green_knight
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_green_knight
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				list_size = {
					name = potential_green_knight
					value = 0
				}
			}
			create_character = {
				template = agot_potential_kingsguard_character
				location = root.capital_province
				save_scope_as = fallback_green_knight
			}
			scope:fallback_green_knight = {
				add_to_list = potential_green_knight
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			position = 0
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_1
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			position = 1
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_2
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			position = 2
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_3
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_3 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Never Mind
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.d
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1002.d.tt
	}
	after = {
		remove_character_flag = choosing_green_knight
		every_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			remove_from_list = potential_green_knight
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1003 = { # Powerful Lordly Scions who will auto-accept
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1003.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1003.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1003.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					list_size = {
						name = potential_green_knight
						value = 0
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1003.desc.no_options
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1003.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:green_knight_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:green_knight_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_6
			}
		}
		any_living_green_knight = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_green_knight
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:green_knight_lord_commander ?= {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20
				highborn_green_knight_candidate = yes
				can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_green_knight
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				is_powerful_vassal = yes
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					highborn_green_knight_candidate = yes
					can_be_green_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_green_knight
			}
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_1
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_2
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = green_knight
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
					this = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_1
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
		scope:green_knight_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_2
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
		scope:green_knight_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_candidate_3
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_3 = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
		scope:green_knight_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		trigger = {
			list_size = {
				name = potential_green_knight
				value > 0
			}
		}
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.d
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1002.d.tt
		scope:green_knight_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
		scope:green_knight_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		trigger = {
			list_size = {
				name = potential_green_knight
				value = 0
			}
		}
		name = agot_green_knight.1002.e
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1002.e.tt
	}
	after = {
		remove_character_flag = choosing_green_knight
		every_in_list = {
			list = potential_green_knight
			remove_from_list = potential_green_knight
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1004 = { # interaction to determine KG acceptance
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		root = {
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
		}
	}
	option = { #I accept
		ai_chance = { # Personality Factor
			base = 100
			opinion_modifier = { # Opinion Factor
				who = this
				opinion_target = scope:king
				multiplier = 0.25
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 10
				has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			}
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_honor = 0.5
				ai_boldness = 0.5
				ai_greed = -0.5
				ai_zeal = 0.5
			}
			modifier = { # big honour for a pleb
				is_lowborn = yes
				add = 50
			}
		}
		scope:king = {
			trigger_event = {
				id = agot_green_knight.1005
				days = {
					10
					20
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #I refuse
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			opinion_modifier = { # Opinion Factor
				who = this
				opinion_target = scope:king
				multiplier = 0.25
			}
			ai_value_modifier = { # Personality Factor
				ai_honor = -0.5
				ai_boldness = -0.5
				ai_greed = 0.5
				ai_zeal = -0.5
			}
			modifier = { #Trained my whole life for this
				factor = 0
				has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			}
			modifier = { # Doesn't want to go celibate
				add = 50
				OR = {
					has_trait = lustful
					has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
				}
			}
			modifier = { # Different Gods go away
				add = 100
				AND = {
					NOT = {
						faith = scope:king.faith
					}
					ai_zeal <= -30 # More cynical characters don't care
				}
			}
			modifier = { # Heirs will almost never
				add = 150
				any_heir_title = {
					exists = this
					place_in_line_of_succession = {
						target = root
						value == 1
					}
				}
			}
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			}
		}
		root = {
			add_character_flag = green_knight_position_rejected
		}
		scope:king = {
			trigger_event = {
				id = agot_green_knight.1007
				days = {
					10
					30
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1005 = { # Candidate Accepts Kingsguard Appointment
	type = letter_event
	opening = {
		desc = agot_green_knight.1005.opening
	}
	desc = agot_green_knight.1005.opening_desc
	sender = scope:green_knight_candidate
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {	scope:green_knight_candidate = { employer = root } } # Not already employed by root
			}
			add_courtier = scope:green_knight_candidate
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					any_heir_title = {
						exists = this
						place_in_line_of_succession = {
							target = prev
							value == 1
						}
					}
				}
			}
			scope:green_knight_candidate = {
				add_character_flag = was_primary_heir
			}
		}
	}
	option = { 	#Welcome to the family son
		name = agot_green_knight.1005.a
		scope:green_knight_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1006 = { # Actually give that loser the KG - recurring event
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_green_knight_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		top_liege = {
			save_scope_as = king
			random_held_title = {
				limit = {
					title_has_green_knight_trigger = yes
				}
				save_scope_as = green_knight_title
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					is_ruler = yes
					is_courtier_of = scope:king
				}
			}
			scope:king = { add_courtier ?= root }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_2
					var:green_knight_2 = root
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_lord_commander
					var:green_knight_lord_commander = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_lord_commander
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_1
					var:green_knight_1 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_1
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_2
					var:green_knight_2 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_2
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_3
					var:green_knight_3 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_3
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_4
					var:green_knight_4 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_4
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_5
					var:green_knight_5 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_5
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_title = {
					exists = var:green_knight_6
					var:green_knight_6 = root
				}
			}
			scope:king = {
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = green_knight_6
					target = root
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			agot_join_green_knight_effect = {
				KINGSGUARD = root
				KING = scope:king
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					root = {
						is_councillor_of = scope:king
					}
				}
				add_trait = green_knight
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1007 = { # Candidate Spurns Kingsguard Appointment
	type = letter_event
	opening = {
		desc = agot_green_knight.1007.opening
	}
	desc = {
		desc = agot_green_knight.1007.opening_desc
		first_valid = { # rejections based on personality
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						NOT = {
							faith = scope:king.faith
						}
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1007.faith
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						any_heir_title = {
							place_in_line_of_succession = {
								target = scope:green_knight_candidate
								value == 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1007.claim
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						has_trait = lustful
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1007.lustful
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						ai_greed > 50
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1007.ambitious
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						opinion = {
							target = scope:king
							value < -30
						}
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1007.hate
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1007.reject
		}
	}
	sender = {
		character = scope:green_knight_candidate
		animation = dismissal
	}
	option = { #I shall look for another!
		name = agot_green_knight.1007.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:removed_kg
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.1007.a.tt
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_green_knight.1003
			days = {
				20
				50
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Blast to this, I'll look later
		name = agot_green_knight.1007.b
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1008 = { # Bestowing Event
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1008.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.1008.desc
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		reference = agot_iron_throne
	}
	immediate = {
		if = { #Close Landed Family Take Priority
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					any_close_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
					}
				}
			}
			scope:green_knight_candidate = {
				random_close_family_member = {
					limit = {
						is_landed = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = family_member
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { # Then Landed Extended Fam
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
					}
				}
			}
			scope:green_knight_candidate = {
				random_close_or_extended_family_member = {
					limit = {
						is_landed = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = family_member
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = { # Then Unlanded General Family
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					any_close_family_member = {
						exists = yes
					}
				}
			}
			scope:green_knight_candidate = {
				random_close_family_member = {
					limit = {
						exists = yes
					}
					save_scope_as = family_member
				}
			}
		}
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:green_knight_candidate
		animation = throne_room_bow_1
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1008.a
		scope:green_knight_candidate = {
			hidden_effect = { add_trait = green_knight }
			agot_create_artifact_kingsguard_armor_effect = { OWNER = this }
			agot_create_artifact_kingsguard_sword_effect = { OWNER = this }
			trigger_event = {
				id = agot_green_knight.1012
				days = 1
			}
		}
		if = { 		#Family Reaction
			limit = {
				exists = scope:family_member
				NOT = {
					scope:family_member = root
				}
			}
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1009
		}
		# event for appointing foreigner
		#event for appointing different religion
	}
	after = {
		#Courtly Vassals Upset at Lowborn Appointment
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					is_lowborn = yes
				}
			}
			every_vassal = {
				limit = {
					has_vassal_stance = courtly
				}
				add_opinion = {
					target = root
					modifier = courtly_lowborn_kingsguard_opinion
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
		#Zealot Vassals Upset at Heathen Appointment
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						faith = root.faith
					}
				}
			}
			every_zealot_vassal = {
				limit = {
					faith = root.faith
				}
				add_opinion = {
					target = root
					modifier = zealot_infidel_kingsguard_opinion
					opinion = -35
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1009 = { # Relatives' Reaction
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1009.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:family_member = {
						has_character_flag = family_mad
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1009.desc.mad
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:family_member = {
						has_character_flag = family_glad
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.1009.desc.glad
			}
		}
		triggered_desc = {
			trigger = {
				scope:green_knight_candidate = {
					has_character_flag = was_primary_heir
				}
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_mad
				}
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1009.desc.heir
		}
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		reference = agot_iron_throne
	}
	immediate = {
		random_list = {
			80 = {
				#Bigger Weight towards happy due to prestige
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					scope:family_member = {
						ai_greed >= low_positive_ai_value
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					scope:family_member = {
						ai_honor >= low_positive_ai_value
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					scope:family_member = {
						ai_boldness >= low_positive_ai_value
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					scope:family_member = {
						opinion = {
							target = scope:king
							value >= medium_positive_opinion
						}
					}
					factor = 2
				}
				#Happy Relative Flag
				scope:family_member = {
					add_character_flag = family_glad
				}
			}
			20 = {
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					scope:family_member = {
						ai_zeal <= medium_negative_zeal
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					scope:family_member = {
						has_trait = paranoid
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 4
					scope:family_member = {
						NOT = {
							faith = {
								has_doctrine_parameter = can_grant_knighthood
							}
						}
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					scope:family_member = {
						opinion = {
							target = scope:king
							value <= medium_negative_opinion
						}
					}
					factor = 2
				}
				modifier = {
					scope:family_member = {
						opinion = {
							target = scope:king
							value <= high_negative_opinion
						}
					}
					factor = 2
				}
				modifier = {
					#Probably very pissed you snagged their heir
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						has_character_flag = was_primary_heir
					}
					factor = 5
				}
				#Mad Relative Flag
				scope:family_member = {
					add_character_flag = family_mad
				}
			}
		}
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:family_member
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_mad
				}
			}
			animation = rage
		}
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_glad
				}
			}
			animation = love
		}
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_mad
				}
			}
			animation = shock
		}
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_glad
				}
			}
			animation = personality_forgiving
		}
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:green_knight_candidate
	}
	option = {
		name = {
			text = {
				first_valid = {
					triggered_desc = {
						trigger = {
							scope:family_member = {
								has_character_flag = family_mad
							}
						}
						desc = agot_green_knight.1009.a.mad
					}
					triggered_desc = {
						trigger = {
							scope:family_member = {
								has_character_flag = family_glad
							}
						}
						desc = agot_green_knight.1009.a.glad
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_mad
				}
			}
			#Tywin was upset at Aerys for Appointing Jaime, harmed their house relations, as it resulted in Tywin having most of House Targaryen killed.
			if = {
				limit = {
					AND = {
						exists = scope:green_knight_candidate.house
						scope:green_knight_candidate.house ?= scope:family_member.house
					}
				}
				scope:king.house = {
					change_house_relation_effect = {
						HOUSE = scope:green_knight_candidate.house
						VALUE = house_relation_damage_minor_value
						REASON = joined_the_kingsguard_bad
						CHAR = scope:green_knight_candidate
						TARGET_CHAR = scope:king
						TITLE = scope:dummy_gender
					}
				}
			}
			set_relation_potential_rival = scope:family_member
			reverse_add_opinion = {
				modifier = insult_opinion
				target = scope:family_member
				opinion = -40
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:family_member = {
					has_character_flag = family_glad
				}
			}
			#What an honour to have a family member on the King's Guard
			if = {
				limit = {
					AND = {
						exists = scope:green_knight_candidate.house
						scope:green_knight_candidate.house ?= scope:family_member.house
					}
				}
				scope:king.house = {
					change_house_relation_effect = {
						HOUSE = scope:green_knight_candidate.house
						VALUE = house_relation_improve_medium_value
						REASON = joined_the_kingsguard
						CHAR = scope:green_knight_candidate
						TARGET_CHAR = scope:king
						TITLE = scope:dummy_gender
					}
				}
			}
			set_relation_potential_friend = scope:family_member
			reverse_add_opinion = {
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				target = scope:family_member
				opinion = 40
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1010 = { # Lord Commander Death / Removal
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1010.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1010.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1010.fallback.desc.intro
		}
