		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:green_knight_successor }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1010.desc.end
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1010.fallback.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
		reference = temple
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:king
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			animation = sadness
		}
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:green_knight_successor
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:removed_kg # The Lord Commander
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			play_music_cue = mx_cue_death
		}
		add_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
		root = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_1
			}
			cp:green_knight_1 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_1
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_2
			}
			cp:green_knight_2 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_2
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_3
			}
			cp:green_knight_3 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_3
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_4
			}
			cp:green_knight_4 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_4
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_5
			}
			cp:green_knight_5 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_5
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_6
			}
			cp:green_knight_6 = {
				save_scope_as = green_knight_6
				add_to_list = green_knight_successor
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = green_knight_successor
			limit = {
				is_alive = yes
			}
			order_by = prowess
			save_scope_as = green_knight_successor
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Successor
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.a
		trigger = {
			#Add an opinion boost here
			exists = scope:green_knight_successor
			scope:green_knight_successor = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_successor
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_successor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_1
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_1 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_1 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_1
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_1 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_2
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_2 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_2 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_2
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_2 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.d
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_3
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_3 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_3 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_3
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_3 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		#Switch
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.e
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				exists = scope:green_knight_4
				exists = scope:green_knight_5
				exists = scope:green_knight_6
			}
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1011
		custom_tooltip = green_knight_other_selections_available_tt
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.f
		trigger = {
			NOR = {
				exists = scope:green_knight_1
				exists = scope:green_knight_2
				exists = scope:green_knight_3
				exists = scope:green_knight_4
				exists = scope:green_knight_5
				exists = scope:green_knight_6
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1011 = { # Lord Commander Death 2
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.1010.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
				desc = agot_green_knight.1010.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.1010.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		desc = agot_green_knight.1010.desc.end
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
		reference = temple
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:king
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			animation = sadness
		}
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:green_knight_successor
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:removed_kg # The Lord Commander
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = { exists = scope:dead_green_knight }
			play_music_cue = mx_cue_death
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1011.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_4
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_4 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_4 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_4
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_4 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1011.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_5
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_5 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_5 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_5
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_5 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1011.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:green_knight_6
			NOT = {
				scope:green_knight_6 = scope:green_knight_successor
			}
			scope:green_knight_6 = { is_alive = yes }
		}
		agot_assign_green_knight_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:green_knight_6
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:green_knight_6 = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
	}
	option = {
		#Switch
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.e
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				scope:green_knight_1 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_2 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_3 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_4 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_5 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_6 ?= { is_alive = yes }
			}
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1010
		custom_tooltip = green_knight_other_selections_available_tt
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.1010.f
		trigger = {
			NOR = {
				scope:green_knight_1 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_2 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_3 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_4 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_5 ?= { is_alive = yes }
				scope:green_knight_6 ?= { is_alive = yes }
			}
		}
		remove_character_flag = choosing_lord_commander
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1012 = { #New Kingsguard Set-up. Memory, prestige, knighthood / celibacy
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		add_prestige_level = 1
		remove_trait = refusing_marriage
		remove_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = dynasty
			}
			dynasty = {
				add_dynasty_prestige = medium_dynasty_prestige_gain
			}
		}
		create_character_memory = {
			type = agot_green_knight_memory
			participants = {
				king = scope:king
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_agot_knight_trigger = no
			}
			random_list = {
				95 = {
					modifier = {
						#Fuck your Sers
						add = {
							value = ai_zeal
							multiply = -1
						}
					}
					modifier = {
						# Not Knights more likely to refuse
						factor = 0.2
						NOT = {
							faith = {
								has_doctrine_parameter = can_grant_knighthood
							}
						}
					}
					# Remove the knight relation
					if = {
						limit = {
							any_relation = {
								type = agot_knight
							}
						}
						random_relation = {
							type = agot_knight
							save_scope_as = my_knight
						}
						remove_relation_agot_knight = scope:my_knight
					}
					agot_become_a_knight_effect = {
						KNIGHT_MAKER = scope:king
						KNIGHT_TO_BE = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					modifier = {
						add = 30
						NOT = {
							faith = {
								has_doctrine_parameter = can_grant_knighthood
							}
						}
					}
					# Rejected Knighthood
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_trait = celibate
				}
			}
			random_list = {
				20 = {
					modifier = {
						add = {
							value = ai_honor
							multiply = 1
						}
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 40
						has_trait = chaste
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 30
						has_sexuality = homosexual
					}
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						has_trait = lustful
					}
					modifier = {
						factor = 0
						has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
					}
					add_trait = celibate
				}
				80 = {
					#No celibacy
					modifier = {
						# I ain't banging anyway
						factor = 0
						has_trait = eunuch_1
					}
					modifier = {
						add = {
							value = ai_honor
							multiply = -1
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Notify liege eventually
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1013 = { #On get title, remove training for green_knight and refusing marriage
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		has_trait = refusing_marriage
		has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
	}
	immediate = {
		remove_trait = refusing_marriage
		remove_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
	}
}

agot_green_knight.1014 = {
	#16th Birthday Shit Kingsguard Realises His Dream is Dead
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		has_trait = refusing_marriage
		has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
		AND = {
			prowess < 15			#Bad at swordies
			NOR = {
				has_trait = education_martial_prowess_2
				has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
				has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
				has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = failed_green_knight
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_parent = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
			}
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				save_scope_as = guardian
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				any_close_family_member = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
			}
			random_close_family_member = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				save_scope_as = guardian
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				any_relation = {
					type = guardian
				}
			}
			random_relation = {
				type = guardian
				save_scope_as = guardian
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = scope:guardian
			}
			scope:guardian = {
				trigger_event = agot_green_knight.3012
			}
		}
	}
}

################################
# Kingsguard Councillor & Chain Events
# 2000 - 2999
# by Badger
################################
agot_green_knight.2001 = {
	title = agot_green_knight.2001.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					scope:target_character = root
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.2001.desc_own_court
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.2001.desc
		}
		triggered_desc = {
			trigger = {
				scope:target_character = { valid_green_knight_bodyguard_target = yes }
			}
			desc = agot_green_knight.2001.desc_bodyguard_courtowner
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		scope:target_character = {
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					valid_green_knight_bodyguard_target = yes
				}
				root = {
					add_to_variable_list = {
						name = possible_characters
						target = prev
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			variable = possible_characters
			set_variable = {
				name = si_selecting_character
				value = root
			}
			root = {
				set_variable = {
					name = si_selected_character
					value = prev
				}
			}
		}
	}
	widget = {
		is_shown = {
			root = {
				any_in_list = {
					variable = possible_characters
					count > 0
				}
			}
		}
		gui = "agot_character_selection_three_options"
		container = "custom_widgets_container"
	}
	theme = crown
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:councillor
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = scope:target_character
	option = {
		trigger = {
			var:si_selected_character ?= {
				valid_green_knight_bodyguard_target = yes
			}
		}
		name = agot_green_knight.2001.a # Protect the designated target
		var:si_selected_character = {
			save_scope_as = selected_character
		}
		agot_start_green_knight_bodyguarding = {
			TARGET = scope:selected_character
		}
	}
	option = {
		trigger = {
			scope:target_character = {
				valid_green_knight_bodyguard_target = yes
			}
		}
		name = agot_green_knight.2001.b # Protect target character
		agot_start_green_knight_bodyguarding = {
			TARGET = scope:target_character
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.2001.c # Nevermind
		scope:councillor = {
			start_default_task = yes
		}
	}
	after = {
		clear_variable_list = possible_characters
		var:si_selected_character ?= {
			remove_variable = si_selecting_character
		}
		remove_variable = si_selected_character
	}
}

#Kingsguard Imprisonment Attempt - Barristan Flees the City
agot_green_knight.2002 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.2002.title
	desc = agot_green_knight.2002.desc
	theme = prison
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:recipient
		animation = anger
	}
	left_portrait = scope:green_knight
	lower_center_portrait = scope:goldcloaks
	immediate = {
		show_as_tooltip = {
			#Remove them as guardian for any child
			if = {
				limit = {
					any_in_list = {
						list = ward_children
						count >= 1
					}
				}
				every_in_list = {
					list = ward_children
					remove_relation_guardian = scope:recipient
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								host = liege
							}
						}
						return_to_court = yes
					}
					guardian_remove_opinion_effect = {
						GUARDIAN = scope:recipient
						WARD = this
						WARD_LIEGE = scope:actor
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_court_position_holder = {
					type = goldcloaks_court_position
				}
			}
			random_court_position_holder = {
				type = goldcloaks_court_position
				save_scope_as = goldcloaks
			}
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					this = scope:recipient
				}
				OR = {
					has_council_position = green_knight_lord_commander
					has_council_position = green_knight_1
					has_council_position = green_knight_2
					has_council_position = green_knight_3
					has_council_position = green_knight_4
					has_council_position = green_knight_5
					has_council_position = green_knight_6
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Send another KG after them
		name = agot_green_knight.2002.a
		scope:green_knight = {
			duel = {
				skill = prowess
				target = scope:recipient
				50 = {
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = -3.5
						min = -49
						max = 49
					}
					scope:green_knight = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:recipient
						}
					}
					desc = agot_green_knight.2002.a.failure
					hidden_effect = {
						scope:recipient = {
							agot_green_knight_fled_effect = yes
						}
					}
				}
				50 = {
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = 3.5
						min = -49
						max = 49
					}
					scope:recipient = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:green_knight
						}
					}
					scope:green_knight = {
						add_prestige_level = 1
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Send goldcloaks after them
		name = agot_green_knight.2002.b
		trigger = {
			any_court_position_holder = {
				type = goldcloaks_court_position
			}
		}
		random_list = {
			50 = { #Gets away
				modifier = {
					add = scope:recipient.prowess
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.2002.a.failure
				show_as_tooltip = {
					scope:recipient = {
						move_to_pool = yes
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					scope:recipient = {
						agot_green_knight_fled_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
			30 = { #Gets away and kills commander of the gold cloaks
				modifier = {
					add = scope:recipient.prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = {
						subtract = scope:goldcloaks.prowess
					}
				}
				show_as_tooltip = {
					scope:recipient = {
						move_to_pool = yes
					}
				}
				scope:goldcloaks = {
					death = {
						death_reason = death_duel
						killer = scope:recipient
					}
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.2002.a.failure
				hidden_effect = {
					scope:recipient = {
						agot_green_knight_fled_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
			20 = { #You catch him
				modifier = {
					add = scope:goldcloaks.martial
				}
				modifier = {
					add = scope:goldcloaks.intrigue
				}
				hard_imprison_character_effect = {
					TARGET = scope:recipient
					IMPRISONER = root
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Leave them go
		name = agot_green_knight.2002.c
		add_prestige = minor_prestige_loss
		scope:recipient = {
			agot_green_knight_fled_effect = yes
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.2003 = { 	#Fleeing Kingsguard relative helps them
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.2003.title
	desc = agot_green_knight.2003.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:fleeing_green_knight
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = wounded_1
					has_trait = wounded_2
					has_trait = wounded_3
				}
			}
			animation = severelywounded
		}
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = {
				OR = {
					always = yes
				}
			}
			animation = personality_vengeful
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_courtier ?= scope:recipient
		random_list = { #Chance they were wounded fleeing the capital
			50 = {
				modifier = {
					add = scope:fleeing_green_knight.prowess
				}
			}
			50 = {
				modifier = {
					add = {
						subtract = scope:fleeing_green_knight.prowess
					}
				}
				add_trait = wounded_1
			}
			50 = {
				modifier = {
					add = {
						subtract = scope:fleeing_green_knight.prowess
					}
				}
				add_trait = wounded_2
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Stay at Court
		name = agot_green_knight.2003.a
		add_prestige_level = -1
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
			modifier = {
				scope:fleeing_green_knight = {
					is_primary_heir_of = root
				}
				factor = 10
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Flee to the Wall
		name = agot_green_knight.2003.b
		trigger = {
			agot_valid_potential_nw_member = yes
		}
		agot_send_to_nightswatch_effect = {
			ACTOR = scope:fleeing_green_knight
			NIGHTSWATCH_CANDIDATE = scope:fleeing_green_knight
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			modifier = {
				scope:fleeing_green_knight = {
					is_primary_heir_of = root
				}
				factor = 0
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Flee to Essos
		name = agot_green_knight.2003.c
		scope:fleeing_green_knight = { trigger_event = agot_green_knight.2004 }
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
		}
	}
	option = { #Hand him over to the crown
		name = agot_green_knight.2003.d
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:crown
			modifier = pleased_opinion
			opinion = 50
		}
		hard_imprison_character_effect = {
			TARGET = scope:fleeing_green_knight
			IMPRISONER = scope:crown
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 25
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.2004 = { # Flee to Essos, KG edition
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		random_county_in_region = {
			region = world_essos
			limit = {
				NOT = { holder = scope:crown }
			}
			title_province = {
				save_scope_as = exile_title
			}
		}
		scope:exile_title.county.holder ?= {
			add_courtier = scope:fleeing_green_knight
		}
	}
}



################################
# Kingsguard Flavour Events
# 3001 - 3999
# by Badger
################################
##########
# Child wishes to join Kingsguard
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3001_candidate_trigger = {
	age < 16
	age > 6
	is_available = yes
	is_ruler = no
	is_ai = yes
	valid_green_knight_gender_trigger = yes
	has_been_promised_grand_wedding = no
	#Appropriate personality
	OR = {
		childhood_loud_child_trigger = yes
		childhood_mean_child_trigger = yes
	}
	#Good enough to get a fighter trait
	prowess >= 7
	#Not very likely to inherit a lot
	trigger_if = {
		limit = { is_child_of = root }
		NOT = {
			any_heir_title = {
				exists = this
				place_in_line_of_succession = {
					target = prev
					value < 2
				}
			}
		}
	}
	trigger_else_if = {
		limit = { is_grandchild_of = root }
		NOT = {
			any_heir_title = {
				exists = this
				place_in_line_of_succession = {
					target = prev
					value < 3
				}
			}
		}
	}
	trigger_else_if = {
		limit = { is_great_grandchild_of = root }
		NOT = {
			any_heir_title = {
				exists = this
				place_in_line_of_succession = {
					target = prev
					value < 4
				}
			}
		}
	}
	trigger_else = {
		NOT = {
			any_heir_title = {
				exists = this
				place_in_line_of_succession = {
					target = prev
					value == 1
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_courtier_of = root
	is_married = no
	NOT = {
		has_character_flag = green_knight_ambition
	}
	OR = {
		is_child_of = root #Either your child
		NOT = {
			any_parent = { #Or their parents are unlanded/dead
				is_landed = yes
				is_alive = yes
			}
		}
	}
	OR = {
		can_be_combatant_based_on_gender_trigger = {
			ARMY_OWNER = top_liege
		}
		can_be_warrior_trigger = {
			ARMY_OWNER = top_liege
		}
	}
	NOR = { #Physiically unsuited
		has_trait = clubfooted
		has_trait = physique_bad_3
		has_trait = crippled
	}
	NAND = { #Zealots won't serve
		NOT = { faith = top_liege.faith }
		ai_zeal >= high_positive_ai_value
	}
	NOR = {
		has_trait = maester
		has_trait = septon
		has_trait = nightswatch
		has_trait = devoted
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3001 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3001.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3001.desc
	left_portrait = scope:child
	right_portrait = root
	lower_right_portrait = scope:lord_commander
	theme = war
	override_background = {
		reference = sitting_room
	}
	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			has_character_flag = had_event_green_knight_3001
		}
		exists = top_liege
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_green_knight_trigger = yes
			OR = {
				exists = cp:green_knight_lord_commander
				exists = cp:green_knight_1
				exists = cp:green_knight_2
				exists = cp:green_knight_3
				exists = cp:green_knight_4
				exists = cp:green_knight_5
				exists = cp:green_knight_6
			}
		}
		dynasty ?= {
			any_dynasty_member = {
				green_knight_3001_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
		modifier = {
			add = -0.5
			any_child = {
				count < 4
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0.5
			any_child = {
				green_knight_3001_candidate_trigger = yes
				has_trait = rowdy
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			#Less likely for wrong faith types
			add = -0.8
			top_liege = {
				save_temporary_scope_as = king
			}
			NOT = {
				root.faith = scope:king.faith
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = {
			flag = had_event_green_knight_3001
			years = 10
		}
		top_liege = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		top_liege = {
			random_councillor = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						has_council_position = green_knight_lord_commander
						has_council_position = green_knight_1
						has_council_position = green_knight_2
						has_council_position = green_knight_3
						has_council_position = green_knight_4
						has_council_position = green_knight_5
						has_council_position = green_knight_6
					}
				}
				save_scope_as = lord_commander
			}
		}
		dynasty = {
			random_dynasty_member = {
				limit = {
					green_knight_3001_candidate_trigger = yes
				}
				weight = {
					base = 1
					modifier = {
						add = 10
						is_child_of = root
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 1
						OR = {
							NOT = {
								is_heir_of = root
							}
							root.primary_title = {
								place_in_line_of_succession = {
									target = prev
									value >= 4
								}
							}
						}
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 0.5
						OR = {
							NOT = {
								is_heir_of = root
							}
							root.primary_title = {
								place_in_line_of_succession = {
									target = prev
									value >= 5
								}
							}
						}
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 0.5
						has_focus = education_martial
					}
					modifier = {
						add = 0.5
						has_trait = rowdy
					}
				}
				save_scope_as = child
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Yes, begin training
		name = agot_green_knight.3001.a
		scope:child = {
			add_trait = refusing_marriage
			add_character_flag = green_knight_ambition
			add_prowess_skill = 1
			add_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_focus = education_martial
					}
				}
				set_focus = education_martial
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = betrothed
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						has_been_promised_grand_wedding = yes
					}
					break_grand_wedding_betrothal_effect = yes
				}
				else = {
					break_betrothal = betrothed
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 80
		}
	}
	option = { 	#I have other plans for you
		name = agot_green_knight.3001.b
		scope:child = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = refusal_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
	}
}

##########
# Honorable Kingsguard Gains Gallant
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3002_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	NOT = {
		has_trait = gallant
	}
	ai_honor >= high_positive_honor	#50 Honor
	prowess >= extremely_high_skill_rating	# ( v = 20 )
}

agot_green_knight.3002 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3002.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3002.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:gallant_green_knight
		animation = personality_honorable
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3002_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
		compare_modifier = {
			target = scope:councillor
			value = ai_honor
			multiplier = 0.01 # At 100 honor, x3 as likely to be picked. At -50 greed, 0% chance of being picked.
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown	# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3002_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = gallant_green_knight
		}
		scope:gallant_green_knight = {
			add_trait = gallant
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3002.a
		scope:gallant_green_knight = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3002.b
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_value
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:gallant_green_knight
			modifier = insulted_opinion
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kingsguard caught in an affair - Lucamore the Lusty
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3003_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		#Can't get caught banging if you can't
		has_trait = eunuch_1
		has_trait = beardless_eunuch
		has_trait = celibate
	}
	OR = {
		has_trait = lustful
		has_trait = rakish
		any_secret = {
			secret_type = secret_lover
			NOT = {
				is_known_by = root
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3003 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3003.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					local_var:room = flag:bedroom
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.3003.desc_bedroom
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					local_var:room = flag:brothel
				}
				desc = agot_green_knight.3003.desc_brothel
			}
		}
	}
	theme = seduce_scheme
	override_background = {
		trigger = {
			local_var:room = flag:bedroom
		}
		reference = sitting_room
	}
	override_background = {
		trigger = {
			local_var:room = flag:brothel
		}
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lusty_green_knight
		animation = shock
		outfit_tags = {
			no_clothes
		}
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lusty_lover
		animation = shame
		outfit_tags = {
			no_clothes
		}
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3003_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
		#Badger to do, this causes errors about unset scope
		# compare_modifier = {
		# 	target = scope:lusty_green_knight
		# 	value = intrigue
		# 	multiplier = -0.05
		# }
	}

	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = marshal_task_side_effect_cooldown # 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3003_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = lusty_green_knight
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:lusty_green_knight = {
					any_relation = {
						type = lover
					}
				}
			}
			scope:lusty_green_knight = {
				random_relation = {
					type = lover
					save_scope_as = lusty_lover
				}
			}
			set_local_variable = {
				name = room
				value = flag:bedroom
			}
		}
		else = {
			create_character = {
				location = root.capital_province
				template = agot_succubus
				dynasty = none
				save_scope_as = lusty_lover
				gender_female_chance = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							scope:lusty_green_knight = {
								is_attracted_to_women = yes
								is_attracted_to_men = no
							}
						}
						add = 100
					}
					else_if = {
						limit = {
							scope:lusty_green_knight = {
								is_attracted_to_men = yes
								is_attracted_to_women = no
							}
						}
						add = 0
					}
					else = {
						add = 50
					}
				}
			}
			set_local_variable = {
				name = room
				value = flag:brothel
			}
		}
		scope:lusty_green_knight = {
			every_secret = {
				limit = {
					secret_type = secret_lover
					secret_target = scope:lusty_lover
				}
				reveal_to = root
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Imprison them
		name = agot_green_knight.3003.a
		imprison = {
			target = scope:lusty_green_knight
			type = dungeon
		}
		show_as_tooltip = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = scope:lusty_green_knight
				modifier = broke_vows_opinion
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = scope:lusty_green_knight
				modifier = broke_vows_opinion
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					local_var:room = flag:brothel
				}
				scope:lusty_lover = {
					death = {
						death_reason = death_vanished
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Goodbye Nuts, hello North
		name = agot_green_knight.3003.b
		trigger = {
			scope:lusty_green_knight = {
				agot_valid_potential_nw_member = yes
			}
		}
		scope:lusty_green_knight = {
			save_scope_as = recipient
			add_character_flag = can_fire_green_knight
			agot_send_to_nightswatch_effect = {
				ACTOR = root
				NIGHTSWATCH_CANDIDATE = scope:lusty_green_knight
			}
			add_trait = eunuch_1
		}
		save_scope_as = actor
		add_dread = major_dread_gain
		torture_blind_castrate_disfigure_opinion_effect = {
			VERB = castrated
		}
		stress_impact = {
			forgiving = major_stress_impact_gain
			calm = major_stress_impact_gain
			compassionate = massive_stress_impact_gain
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					local_var:room = flag:brothel
				}
				scope:lusty_lover = {
					death = {
						death_reason = death_vanished
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = -1
			}
			modifier = {
				has_trait = sadistic
				add = 50
			}
			modifier = {
				has_trait = torturer
				add = 50
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Strip him of the Cloak
		name = agot_green_knight.3003.c
		agot_remove_green_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:lusty_green_knight }
		scope:lusty_green_knight = {
			select_and_move_to_pool_effect = yes
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			scope:lusty_green_knight = {
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					local_var:room = flag:brothel
				}
				scope:lusty_lover = {
					death = {
						death_reason = death_vanished
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
		}
	}
	option = {
		#This guy fucks for sure
		name = agot_green_knight.3003.d
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:lusty_green_knight
			modifier = grateful_opinion
			opinion = 30
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:lusty_green_knight
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:lusty_green_knight
			}
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					local_var:room = flag:brothel
				}
				scope:lusty_green_knight = {
					set_relation_lover = scope:lusty_lover
					add_secret = {
						type = secret_lover
						target = scope:lusty_lover
					}
					every_secret = {
						limit = {
							secret_type = secret_lover
							secret_target = scope:lusty_lover
						}
						reveal_to = root
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:lusty_lover
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#lusty/artbitrary keep your white claok, but I'll have her
		name = agot_green_knight.3003.e
		trigger = {
			is_attracted_to_gender_of = scope:lusty_lover
			OR = {
				has_trait = lustful
				has_trait = arbitrary
				has_trait = rakish
			}
			local_var:room = flag:brothel
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:lusty_lover
		had_sex_with_effect = {
			CHARACTER = scope:lusty_lover
			PREGNANCY_CHANCE = pregnancy_chance
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = lustful
					has_trait = rakish
				}
				add = 100
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		scope:lusty_green_knight = {
			remove_character_flag = can_fire_green_knight
		}
	}
}

# MAKE WAY FOR THE KINGSGUARD !
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3004_green_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		ai_compassion <= high_negative_compassion		# -50
		ai_honor <= high_negative_honor		# -50
	}
	save_temporary_scope_as = green_knight_temp
}

scripted_trigger green_knight_3004_child_candidate_trigger = {
	OR = {
		childhood_mean_child_trigger = yes
		childhood_loud_child_trigger = yes
	}
	NOR = {
		is_close_or_extended_family_of = scope:green_knight_temp
		#KG would be braindead to march down a prince/princess
		is_close_or_extended_family_of = root
		this = root
	}
	age < 15
	age > 3
	is_human = yes # No marching down dragons
}

agot_green_knight.3004 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3004.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3004.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:marching_green_knight
		animation = personality_vengeful
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:obstructing_brat
		animation = lunatic
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3004_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
		any_courtier_or_guest = {
			green_knight_3004_child_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3004_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = marching_green_knight
		}
		random_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3004_child_candidate_trigger = yes
				NOT = {
					is_close_or_extended_family_of = scope:marching_green_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = obstructing_brat
		}
		scope:obstructing_brat = {
			random_list = {
				80 = {
					add_trait = wounded_1
				}
				20 = {
					add_trait = wounded_2
				}
				10 = {
					add_trait = wounded_3
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3004.a
		add_prestige = minor_prestige_value
		scope:obstructing_brat = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = angry_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
			every_close_family_member = {
				add_opinion = {
					target = root
					modifier = angry_opinion
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3004.b
		add_piety = minor_piety_value
		scope:marching_green_knight = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = overreaction_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					num_of_relation_ward < 2
				}
				set_relation_ward = scope:obstructing_brat
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3004.c
		trigger = {
			court_physician_available_trigger = yes
		}
		save_court_physician_as_effect = {
			SCOPE_NAME = physician
		}
		random_list = {
			50 = {
				modifier = {
					factor = scope:physician.physician_safe_treatment_skill_factor
				}
				scope:obstructing_brat = {
					wound_treatment_results_effect = {
						TREATMENT = safe
						OUTCOME = success
					}
				}
				scope:obstructing_brat = {
					add_opinion = {
						target = root
						modifier = grateful_opinion
						opinion = 25
					}
					every_close_family_member = {
						add_opinion = {
							target = root
							modifier = grateful_opinion
							opinion = 25
						}
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					send_interface_toast = {
						left_icon = scope:obstructing_brat
						title = agot_green_knight.3004.cure_toast
						show_as_tooltip = {
							scope:obstructing_brat = {
								wound_treatment_results_effect = {
									TREATMENT = safe
									OUTCOME = success
								}
							}
						}
						show_as_tooltip = {
							add_diplomacy_lifestyle_xp = medium_lifestyle_xp
						}
					}
				}
			}
			50 = {
				scope:obstructing_brat = {
					add_opinion = {
						target = root
						modifier = angry_opinion
						opinion = -25
					}
					every_close_family_member = {
						add_opinion = {
							target = root
							modifier = angry_opinion
							opinion = -20
						}
					}
				}
				hidden_effect = {
					send_interface_toast = {
						left_icon = scope:obstructing_brat
						title = agot_green_knight.3004.toast
						custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.3004.toast_desc
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3005 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3005.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3005.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:essosi_warrior
		animation = personality_vengeful
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:sponsor
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	trigger = {
		#add in KG can be reassigned law when online
		any_councillor = {
			exists = yes
		}
		AND = {
			OR = {
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_1
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_2
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_3
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_4
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_5
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_6
				}
			}
			any_living_green_knight = {
				#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
				top_liege = root
				count < 3
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		create_character = {
			template = agot_essosi_warrior
			location = root.capital_province
			save_scope_as = essosi_warrior
		}
		random_councillor = {
			save_scope_as = sponsor
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3005.a
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.3005.agot_green_knight.tt
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_1
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_2
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_3
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_4
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_5
				}
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:green_knight_6
				}
			}
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:essosi_warrior
		scope:essosi_warrior = {
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
		}
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				opinion = 10
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				add_hook = {
					type = loyalty_hook
					target = scope:essosi_warrior
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
		ai_chance = {
			#why not its cool
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		#What about another position?
		name = agot_green_knight.3005.b
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.3005.court_position.tt
		add_courtier ?= scope:essosi_warrior
		hidden_effect = {
			random_list = {
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = household_guard_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = household_guard_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = household_guard
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = bodyguard_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = bodyguard_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = bodyguard
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = executioner_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = executioner_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = executioner
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = gaoler_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = gaoler_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = gaoler
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = master_of_horse_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = master_of_horse_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = master_of_horse
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = master_of_hunt_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = master_of_hunt_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = master_of_hunt
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
				5 = {
					trigger = {
						can_employ_court_position_type = antiquarian_court_position
						NOT = {
							employs_court_position = antiquarian_court_position
						}
					}
					court_position_grant_effect = {
						POS = antiquarian
						CANDIDATE = scope:essosi_warrior
						EMPLOYER = root
					}
				}
			}
			scope:sponsor = {
				add_hook = {
					type = loyalty_hook
					target = scope:essosi_warrior
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Piss off
		name = agot_green_knight.3005.c
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -10
			}
		}
		scope:essosi_warrior = {
			#Rare event so should be okay to have him wandering around? Revisit
			select_and_move_to_pool_effect = yes
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
		}
	}
}

# Kingsguard Become Brothers in Arms

scripted_trigger green_knight_3006_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	ai_sociability >= low_positive_ai_value	#An Extrovert
	save_temporary_scope_as = friendly_green_knight_temp
	top_liege = {
		any_councillor = {
			is_available_adult = yes
			is_green_knight_trigger = yes
			can_set_relation_best_friend_trigger = { CHARACTER = scope:friendly_green_knight_temp }
			NOR = {
				this = scope:friendly_green_knight_temp
				has_relation_friend = scope:friendly_green_knight_temp
			}
			#have some compatibility
			opinion = {
				target = scope:friendly_green_knight_temp
				value > 10
			}
			reverse_opinion = {
				target = scope:friendly_green_knight_temp
				value > 0
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3006 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3006.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3006.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus

	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:friendly_green_knight
		animation = happiness
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:green_knight_friend
		animation = admiration
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3006_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		save_scope_as = king
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3006_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = friendly_green_knight
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				is_available_adult = yes
				is_green_knight_trigger = yes
				can_set_relation_best_friend_trigger = { CHARACTER = scope:friendly_green_knight }
				NOR = {
					this = scope:friendly_green_knight
					has_relation_friend = scope:friendly_green_knight
				}
				#have some compatibility
				opinion = {
					target = scope:friendly_green_knight
					value > 10
				}
				reverse_opinion = {
					target = scope:friendly_green_knight
					value > 0
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = green_knight_friend
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3006.a
		scope:friendly_green_knight = {
			set_relation_best_friend = { reason = best_friend_green_knight copy_reason = friend target = scope:green_knight_friend }
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:friendly_green_knight = {
						is_attracted_to_gender_of = scope:green_knight_friend
					}
					scope:green_knight_friend = {
						is_attracted_to_gender_of = scope:friendly_green_knight
					}
				}
				random_list = {
					50 = {}
					50 = {
						scope:friendly_green_knight = {
							set_relation_lover = scope:green_knight_friend
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

scripted_trigger green_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	OR = {
		ai_energy >= 0
		ai_zeal >= 0
		ai_honor >= 0
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3007 = {
	type = character_event
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3007_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 5
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					NOT = {
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_1
				}
				modifier = {
					factor = 2
					has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = improved_green_knight
		}
		send_interface_message = {
			type = msg_marshal_task_good
			title = agot_green_knight.3007.notification
			desc = agot_green_knight.3007.desc
			tooltip = task_train_commanders_notification_tooltip
			left_icon = scope:improved_green_knight
			scope:improved_green_knight = {
				agot_prowess_rank_up_effect = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

##########
# Training for KG asks to join and can hang out at court until there's a space - Balon Swann
# Badger
#########
agot_green_knight.3008 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3008.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3008.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:candidate
		animation = personality_vengeful
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:sponsor
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	trigger = {
		#add in KG can be reassigned law when online
		any_councillor = {
			exists = yes
		}
		any_living_character = {
			is_available_ai_adult = yes
			top_liege = root
			has_trait = refusing_marriage
			has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			NOT = {
				is_courtier_of = root
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_living_character = {
			limit = {
				is_available_ai_adult = yes
				top_liege = root
				has_trait = refusing_marriage
				has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
				NOT = {
					is_courtier_of = root
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = candidate
		}
		random_councillor = {
			save_scope_as = sponsor
		}
		hidden_effect = {
			#Make him worth having
			scope:candidate = {
				agot_prowess_rank_up_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = {
						OR = {
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
							has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
						}
					}
					blademaster_lifestyle_rank_up_effect = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3008.a
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.3008.agot_green_knight.tt
		trigger = {
			AND = {
				OR = {
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_1
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_2
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_3
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_4
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_5
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:green_knight_6
					}
				}
				any_living_green_knight = {
					#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
					top_liege = root
					count < 3
				}
			}
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:candidate
		add_hook = {
			type = loyalty_hook
			target = scope:candidate
		}
		scope:candidate = {
			save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
			trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1006
		}
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				opinion = 10
			}
			hidden_effect = {
				add_hook = {
					type = loyalty_hook
					target = scope:candidate
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = agot_green_knight.1008
		ai_chance = {
			#why not its cool
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		#You may wait until a space opens up
		name = agot_green_knight.3005.b
		custom_tooltip = agot_green_knight.3008.b.tt
		scope:candidate = {
			#Rare event so should be okay to have him wandering around? Revisit
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = pleased_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		add_courtier ?= scope:candidate
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Piss off
		name = agot_green_knight.3008.c
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain		#get dunked on
		scope:sponsor = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -20
			}
		}
		scope:candidate = {
			#Rare event so should be okay to have him wandering around? Revisit
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = insulted_opinion
				opinion = -50
			}
			remove_trait = refusing_marriage
			remove_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 0
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kinsgguard training hard gains strong/athletic
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		has_trait = strong
		has_trait = athletic
		has_trait = gout_ridden
		has_trait = clubfooted
	}
	ai_energy >= low_positive_energy	#15 No lazy bois
}

agot_green_knight.3010 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3010.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3010.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:strong_green_knight
		animation = wrestling_victory
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = throne_room_applaud_1
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = strong_green_knight
			add_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
			random_list = {
				60 = {
					add_trait = strong
				}
				40 = {
					add_trait = athletic
				}
			}
			add_character_modifier = {
				modifier = brawny_modifier
				years = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3010.a
	}
	after = {
		scope:strong_green_knight = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Challenger approaches !
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3011_green_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	NOT = { has_council_position = green_knight_lord_commander }
	OR = {
		has_trait = craven
		has_trait = lazy
		prowess < 20
	}
}

scripted_trigger green_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = {
	top_liege = root
	is_available_ai_adult = yes
	has_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
	prowess >= 20
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	OR = {
		ai_boldness >= medium_positive_boldness		#25
		ai_rationality <= medium_negative_rationality		# -25
		ai_vengefulness >= high_positive_vengefulness		#50
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3011 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3011.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3011.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:unworthy_green_knight
		animation = personality_dishonorable
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:challenger
		animation = anger
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3011_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
		any_living_character = {
			green_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3011_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = unworthy_green_knight
		}
		random_living_character = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = challenger
			add_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
		add_character_flag = replacing_green_knight
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3011.a
		scope:challenger = {
			duel = {
				target = scope:unworthy_green_knight
				skill = prowess
				50 = {
					#challenger wins
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = 2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:unworthy_green_knight = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:challenger
						}
					}
					root = {
						save_scope_as = king
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						save_scope_as = green_knight_candidate
					}
					scope:king = {
						add_courtier ?= scope:green_knight_candidate
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_green_knight.1008
							days = 1
						}
					}
					scope:green_knight_candidate = {
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_green_knight.1006
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_green_knight.3011.a.challenger.toast
							left_icon = scope:challenger
							right_icon = scope:unworthy_green_knight
							scope:challenger = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
				50 = {
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = -2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:unworthy_green_knight
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_green_knight.3011.a.unworthy_green_knight.toast
							left_icon = scope:unworthy_green_knight
							right_icon = scope:challenger
							scope:unworthy_green_knight = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3011.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:unworthy_green_knight
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:unworthy_green_knight
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3011.c
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		imprison_character_effect = {
			TARGET = scope:challenger
			IMPRISONER = root
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_green_knight
			}
			remove_character_flag = replacing_green_knight
		}
		scope:challenger = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
	}
}

##########
# The Dream is Dead! Bad character training for KG is told to get a real job
# Badger
#########
agot_green_knight.3012 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3012.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3012.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:failed_green_knight
		animation = shame
	}
	trigger = {
		scope:failed_green_knight = {
			AND = {
				prowess < 15				#Bad at swordies
				NOR = {
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_2
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
				}
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		top_liege = { save_scope_as = ruler }
	}
	option = {
		#Get a Real job!
		name = agot_green_knight.3012.a
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_green_knight
			modifier = hurt_opinion
			opinion = -25
		}
		set_relation_potential_rival = scope:failed_green_knight
		scope:failed_green_knight = {
			remove_trait = refusing_marriage
			remove_character_modifier = training_for_green_knight
			add_stress = medium_stress_gain
			random_list = {
				70 = {
				}
				30 = {
					add_trait = depressed_1
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
		}
	}
	option = {
		#How about a different order? - Send to Wall
		name = agot_green_knight.3012.b
		trigger = {
			scope:failed_green_knight = {
				agot_valid_potential_nw_member = yes
			}
		}
		agot_send_to_nightswatch_effect = {
			ACTOR = root
			NIGHTSWATCH_CANDIDATE = scope:failed_green_knight
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
	}
	option = {
		#I'm sure you'll get better!
		name = agot_green_knight.3012.c
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_green_knight
			modifier = kindness_opinion
			opinion = 25
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
	}
}

# A Kingsguard is caught carousing especially hard!
# Badger

scripted_trigger green_knight_3013_green_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = gluttonous
		has_trait = drunkard
		has_trait = gregarious
		has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
	}
}

agot_green_knight.3013 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3013.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3013.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:drunken_green_knight
		animation = toast_goblet
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3013_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3013_green_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = drunken_green_knight
		}
		scope:drunken_green_knight = {
			reveler_lifestyle_rank_up_check_effect = yes
			random_list = {
				50 = {
				}
				50 = {
					add_trait = drunkard
					modifier = {
						factor = 5
						has_character_modifier = patron_drunken_god_modifier
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3013.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:drunken_green_knight = {
					has_trait = drunkard
				}
			}
			scope:drunken_green_knight = {
				remove_trait = drunkard
			}
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_gain
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_green_knight
			modifier = annoyed_opinion
			opinion = -30
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_trait = gluttonous
					has_trait = drunkard
					has_trait = gregarious
					has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3013.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:drunken_green_knight
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:drunken_green_knight
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_green_knight = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_green_knight
			modifier = pleased_opinion
			opinion = 15
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3013.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_trait = gluttonous
				has_trait = drunkard
				has_trait = gregarious
				has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_green_knight = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_loss
		progress_towards_friend_effect = {
			REASON = friend_drinking_buddies
			CHARACTER = scope:drunken_green_knight
			OPINION = default_friend_opinion
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kingsguard Gains Blademaster
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger green_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_green_knight_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	NOR = {
		AND = {
			has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			has_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value >= 100
			}
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = hunter GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = falconer GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
	}
	ai_energy >= 0	#Has to be going out doing things
}

agot_green_knight.3014 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3014.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3014.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = army_camp

	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lifestyle_green_knight
		animation = wooden_sword_coup_degrace
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = blademaster_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_green_knight
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3014.a
		scope:lifestyle_green_knight = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			}
			add_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value = {
					integer_range = {
						min = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_low
						max = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_high
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kingsguard Gains Hunter
# Badger
#########
agot_green_knight.3015 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_green_knight.3015.t
	desc = agot_green_knight.3015.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = wilderness_forest
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lifestyle_green_knight
		animation = hunting_longbow_aim_arrow_default
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			green_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_green_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				green_knight_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = hunting_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_green_knight
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_green_knight.3015.a
		scope:lifestyle_green_knight = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_hunter
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_hunter
			}
			add_random_tiered_trait_track_xp_effect = {
				TRAIT = lifestyle_hunter
				TRACK = hunter
				LEVEL_1 = yes
				LEVEL_3 = yes
			}
		}
	}
}
