scripted_effect kg_decision_list_builder = {
	scope:title_with_kg.var:sun_knight_$NUM$ ?= {
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_character_flag = agot_is_at_unknown_place }
			}
			add_to_list = kg_decision_list
		}
	}
}

agot_sun_knight.9100 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_sun_knight.9100.t
	desc = agot_sun_knight.9100.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = scope:loser
	trigger = {
		scope:title_with_kg = {
			has_variable = {
				name = sun_knight_1
				name = sun_knight_2
				name = sun_knight_3
				name = sun_knight_4
				name = sun_knight_5
				name = sun_knight_6
				name = sun_knight_lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 1 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 2 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 3 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 4 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 5 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 6 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = lord_commander }
		add_character_flag = {
			flag = skip_kg_replacement_event_flag
			days = 14
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_sun_knight.9100.a
		trigger_event = agot_sun_knight.9101
	}
}
agot_sun_knight.9101 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_sun_knight.9101.t
	desc = agot_sun_knight.9101.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:right_portrait_kg animation = beg
	}
	widget = {
		is_shown = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		gui = "agot_mw_kg_removal_selection"
		container = "custom_widgets_container"
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = no
			}
			every_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				root = {
					add_to_variable_list = {
						name = kg_decision_widget_list
						target = prev
					}
				}
			}
			random_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				save_scope_as = right_portrait_kg
			}
		}
		else = {
			ordered_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				order_by = "opinion(root)"
				save_scope_as = kg
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_sun_knight.9101.a
		trigger = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		every_in_list = {
			variable = kg_removes_list
			custom_tooltip = agot_sun_knight.9101.a_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				agot_remove_sun_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = this }
				root = {
					imprison = {
						target = prev
						type = dungeon
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_sun_knight.9101.b
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		agot_remove_sun_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:kg }
		imprison = {
			target = scope:kg
			type = dungeon
		}
		scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_sun_knight.9101.c
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		scope:kg = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = was_spared
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			opinion_modifier = {
				opinion_target = scope:kg
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = yes
			}
			scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
			if = {
				limit = {
					list_size:kg_decision_list > 0
				}
				clear_saved_scope = kg
				trigger_event = agot_sun_knight.9101
			}
		}
		else = {
			clear_variable_list = kg_removes_list
			clear_variable_list = kg_decision_widget_list
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Kingsguard is found dead outside a brothel! - Owen Bush
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger sun_knight_3017_sun_knight_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_sun_knight_trigger = yes
	is_male = yes #Can't cut off a penis that ain't there
	OR = { #Would visit a brothel
		has_trait = lustful
		has_trait = rakish
		#has_trait = lifestyle_reveler - makes sense but EVERYONE ends up with this stupid fucking trait somehow so makes the pool far too wide
	}
	NOR = {
		has_trait = celibate
		has_trait = chaste
		has_trait = eunuch
		has_trait = beardless_eunuch
	}
	ai_compassion <= high_negative_compassion #Cruel
}

agot_sun_knight.3017 = { # Reddit's favourite event
	type = character_event
	title = agot_sun_knight.3017.t
	desc = agot_sun_knight.3017.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:eunuch_sun_knight
		animation = poison
		outfit_tags = { no_clothes }
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			sun_knight_3017_sun_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_sun_knight_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				sun_knight_3017_sun_knight_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = eunuch_sun_knight
		}
		scope:eunuch_sun_knight = {
			add_trait = eunuch_1
			death = {
				death_reason = death_suffocate_on_cock
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_sun_knight.3017.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				capital_county.culture = { has_cultural_tradition = tradition_city_keepers }
			}
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = high_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = medium_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

##### storm_knight (e_the_stormlands) #####
namespace = agot_storm_knight

################################
# Kingsguard Maintenance and Appointment Events
# 1000 - 1999
# by Badger
################################

agot_storm_knight.1000 = { #Kingsguard Death Maintenance Event
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			title:e_the_stormlands = {
				has_variable = kingslanding_exploding
			}
		}
		OR = {
			has_trait = storm_knight
			has_council_position = storm_knight_lord_commander
			has_council_position = storm_knight_1
			has_council_position = storm_knight_2
			has_council_position = storm_knight_3
			has_council_position = storm_knight_4
			has_council_position = storm_knight_5
			has_council_position = storm_knight_6
		}
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_storm_knight_trigger = yes
		}
		NOT = { #surpress the notification in specific events
			top_liege = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_storm_knight
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = dead_storm_knight
		agot_remove_storm_knight_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:dead_storm_knight }
	}
}

scripted_trigger new_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
scripted_trigger new_highborn_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		highborn_storm_knight_candidate = yes
		can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
agot_storm_knight.1001 = { # Standard KG Member Death / Removal
	type = character_event
	title = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.t
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.fallback.t
		}
	}
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = { # Comment on Prowess
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_storm_knight
					scope:dead_storm_knight.prowess >= 35
				}
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.talented
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_storm_knight
					scope:dead_storm_knight.prowess >= 20
				}
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.suitable
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_storm_knight
					scope:dead_storm_knight.prowess >= 10
				}
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.passing
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_storm_knight
					scope:dead_storm_knight.prowess < 10
				}
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.unsuitable
			}
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.desc.end
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1001.fallback.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
		reference = temple
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:king
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
			animation = sadness
		}
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:removed_kg
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
			animation = personality_zealous
		}
		animation = personality_cynical
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				scope:lord_commander = scope:removed_kg
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
			play_music_cue = mx_cue_death
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_lord_commander
			}
			cp:storm_knight_lord_commander = {
				save_scope_as = lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Greatest Knights in all the realm
		name = agot_storm_knight.1001.a
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_storm_knight.1001.a.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				OR = {
					any_vassal_or_below = {
						primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
						new_kg_trigger = yes
					}
					new_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_storm_knight.1002
			days = { 10 20 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_storm_knight.1001.a.tt
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Sons of Powerful Lords
		name = agot_storm_knight.1001.b
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_storm_knight.1001.b.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				any_vassal_or_below = {
					primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
					is_powerful_vassal = yes
					new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_storm_knight.1003
			days = { 30 60 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_storm_knight.1001.b.tt
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1001.c
		custom_tooltip = agot_storm_knight.1001.c.tt
	}
}

agot_storm_knight.1002 = { # Greatest Knights
	type = character_event
	title = agot_storm_knight.1002.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1002.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1002.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		desc = agot_storm_knight.1002.desc.end
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:storm_knight_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_6
			}
		}
		any_living_storm_knight = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_storm_knight
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:storm_knight_lord_commander = {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20
				can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_storm_knight
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_storm_knight
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				list_size = {
					name = potential_storm_knight
					value = 0
				}
			}
			create_character = {
				template = agot_potential_kingsguard_character
				location = root.capital_province
				save_scope_as = fallback_storm_knight
			}
			scope:fallback_storm_knight = {
				add_to_list = potential_storm_knight
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			position = 0
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_1
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			position = 1
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_2
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			position = 2
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:storm_knight_candidate_3
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_3 = {
			trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Never Mind
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.d
		custom_tooltip = agot_storm_knight.1002.d.tt
	}
	after = {
		remove_character_flag = choosing_storm_knight
		every_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			remove_from_list = potential_storm_knight
		}
	}
}

agot_storm_knight.1003 = { # Powerful Lordly Scions who will auto-accept
	type = character_event
	title = agot_storm_knight.1003.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_storm_knight }
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1003.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1003.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					list_size = {
						name = potential_storm_knight
						value = 0
					}
				}
				desc = agot_storm_knight.1003.desc.no_options
			}
			desc = agot_storm_knight.1003.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:storm_knight_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:storm_knight_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:storm_knight_6
			}
		}
		any_living_storm_knight = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_storm_knight
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:storm_knight_lord_commander ?= {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20

				can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_storm_knight
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				is_powerful_vassal = yes
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					highborn_storm_knight_candidate = yes
					can_be_storm_knight_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_storm_knight
			}
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_storm_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_1
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_storm_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_2
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_storm_knight
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = storm_knight_position_rejected
					has_trait = storm_knight
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
					this = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_storm_knight
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:storm_knight_candidate_1
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1006
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1008
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_storm_knight.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:storm_knight_candidate_2
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1006
			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_storm_knight.1008
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:storm_knight_candidate_3 ?= {

			save_scope_as = storm_knight_candidate
		}
