##########
# Kinsgguard training hard gains strong/athletic
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger saltguard_3010_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_saltguard_trigger = yes
	NOR = {
		has_trait = strong
		has_trait = athletic
		has_trait = gout_ridden
		has_trait = clubfooted
	}
	ai_energy >= low_positive_energy	#15 No lazy bois
}

agot_saltguard.3010 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3010.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3010.desc
	theme = martial_authority_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:strong_saltguard
		animation = wrestling_victory
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = throne_room_applaud_1
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3010_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = strong_saltguard
			add_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
			random_list = {
				60 = {
					add_trait = strong
				}
				40 = {
					add_trait = athletic
				}
			}
			add_character_modifier = {
				modifier = brawny_modifier
				years = 5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3010.a
	}
	after = {
		scope:strong_saltguard = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_stripped_to_waist
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Challenger approaches !
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger saltguard_3011_saltguard_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_saltguard_trigger = yes
	NOT = { has_council_position = saltguard_lord_commander }
	OR = {
		has_trait = craven
		has_trait = lazy
		prowess < 20
	}
}

scripted_trigger saltguard_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = {
	top_liege = root
	is_available_ai_adult = yes
	has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
	prowess >= 20
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	OR = {
		ai_boldness >= medium_positive_boldness		#25
		ai_rationality <= medium_negative_rationality		# -25
		ai_vengefulness >= high_positive_vengefulness		#50
	}
}

agot_saltguard.3011 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3011.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3011.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = throne_room_west
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:unworthy_saltguard
		animation = personality_dishonorable
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:challenger
		animation = anger
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3011_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
		any_living_character = {
			saltguard_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3011_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = unworthy_saltguard
		}
		random_living_character = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3011_challenger_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = challenger
			add_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
		add_character_flag = replacing_saltguard
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3011.a
		scope:challenger = {
			duel = {
				target = scope:unworthy_saltguard
				skill = prowess
				50 = {
					#challenger wins
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = 2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:unworthy_saltguard = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:challenger
						}
					}
					root = {
						save_scope_as = king
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						save_scope_as = saltguard_candidate
					}
					scope:king = {
						add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_candidate
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_saltguard.1008
							days = 1
						}
					}
					scope:saltguard_candidate = {
						trigger_event = {
							id = agot_saltguard.1006
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_saltguard.3011.a.challenger.toast
							left_icon = scope:challenger
							right_icon = scope:unworthy_saltguard
							scope:challenger = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
				50 = {
					compare_modifier = {
						value = scope:duel_value
						multiplier = -2.5
						min = -49
					}
					scope:challenger = {
						death = {
							death_reason = death_duel
							killer = scope:unworthy_saltguard
						}
					}
					root = {
						send_interface_toast = {
							title = agot_saltguard.3011.a.unworthy_saltguard.toast
							left_icon = scope:unworthy_saltguard
							right_icon = scope:challenger
							scope:unworthy_saltguard = {
								add_prestige_level = 1
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3011.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:unworthy_saltguard
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:unworthy_saltguard
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3011.c
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		imprison_character_effect = {
			TARGET = scope:challenger
			IMPRISONER = root
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			ai_value_modifier = {
				ai_compassion = 0.5
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_saltguard
			}
			remove_character_flag = replacing_saltguard
		}
		scope:challenger = {
			remove_character_flag = single_combat_duel_armor
		}
	}
}

##########
# The Dream is Dead! Bad character training for KG is told to get a real job
# Badger
#########
agot_saltguard.3012 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3012.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3012.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = courtyard
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:failed_saltguard
		animation = shame
	}
	trigger = {
		scope:failed_saltguard = {
			AND = {
				prowess < 15				#Bad at swordies
				NOR = {
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_2
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
				}
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		top_liege = { save_scope_as = ruler }
	}
	option = {
		#Get a Real job!
		name = agot_saltguard.3012.a
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_saltguard
			modifier = hurt_opinion
			opinion = -25
		}
		set_relation_potential_rival = scope:failed_saltguard
		scope:failed_saltguard = {
			remove_trait = refusing_marriage
			remove_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
			add_stress = medium_stress_gain
			random_list = {
				70 = {
				}
				30 = {
					add_trait = depressed_1
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 70
		}
	}
	option = {
		#How about a different order? - Send to Wall
		name = agot_saltguard.3012.b
		trigger = {
			scope:failed_saltguard = {
				agot_valid_potential_nw_member = yes
			}
		}
		agot_send_to_nightswatch_effect = {
			ACTOR = root
			NIGHTSWATCH_CANDIDATE = scope:failed_saltguard
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
		}
	}
	option = {
		#I'm sure you'll get better!
		name = agot_saltguard.3012.c
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:failed_saltguard
			modifier = kindness_opinion
			opinion = 25
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Kingsguard is caught carousing especially hard!
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger saltguard_3013_saltguard_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_saltguard_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = gluttonous
		has_trait = drunkard
		has_trait = gregarious
		has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
	}
}

agot_saltguard.3013 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3013.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3013.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:drunken_saltguard
		animation = toast_goblet
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3013_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3013_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = drunken_saltguard
		}
		scope:drunken_saltguard = {
			reveler_lifestyle_rank_up_check_effect = yes
			random_list = {
				50 = {
				}
				50 = {
					add_trait = drunkard
					modifier = {
						factor = 5
						has_character_modifier = patron_drunken_god_modifier
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3013.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:drunken_saltguard = {
					has_trait = drunkard
				}
			}
			scope:drunken_saltguard = {
				remove_trait = drunkard
			}
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_gain
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_saltguard
			modifier = annoyed_opinion
			opinion = -30
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
			modifier = {
				factor = 0
				OR = {
					has_trait = gluttonous
					has_trait = drunkard
					has_trait = gregarious
					has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3013.b
		if = {
			limit = {
				can_add_hook = {
					target = scope:drunken_saltguard
					type = loyalty_hook
				}
			}
			add_hook = {
				type = loyalty_hook
				target = scope:drunken_saltguard
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_saltguard = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		reverse_add_opinion = {
			target = scope:drunken_saltguard
			modifier = pleased_opinion
			opinion = 15
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 50
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3013.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_trait = gluttonous
				has_trait = drunkard
				has_trait = gregarious
				has_trait = lifestyle_reveler
			}
		}
		scope:drunken_saltguard = {
			add_prestige_level = 1
		}
		add_prestige = medium_prestige_gain
		add_piety = medium_piety_loss
		progress_towards_friend_effect = {
			REASON = friend_drinking_buddies
			CHARACTER = scope:drunken_saltguard
			OPINION = default_friend_opinion
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 100
		}
	}
}

##########
# Kingsguard Gains Blademaster
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger saltguard_3014_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_saltguard_trigger = yes
	OR = {
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
		has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
	}
	NOR = {
		AND = {
			has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			has_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value >= 100
			}
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = hunter GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
		AND = {
			hunt_lifestyle_track_greater_equal_trigger = { TRACK = falconer GREATER_EQUAL = 100 }
		}
	}
	ai_energy >= 0	#Has to be going out doing things
}

agot_saltguard.3014 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3014.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3014.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = army_camp

	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lifestyle_saltguard
		animation = wooden_sword_coup_degrace
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = blademaster_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_saltguard
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3014.a
		scope:lifestyle_saltguard = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			}
			add_trait_xp = {
				trait = lifestyle_blademaster
				value = {
					integer_range = {
						min = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_low
						max = medium_lifestyle_random_xp_high
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.3015 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3015.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3015.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = wilderness_forest
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:lifestyle_saltguard
		animation = hunting_longbow_aim_arrow_default
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_content
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	weight_multiplier = {
		base = 1
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3014_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = 100
					culture = {
						has_cultural_parameter = hunting_traits_more_common
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = lifestyle_saltguard
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3015.a
		scope:lifestyle_saltguard = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						has_trait = lifestyle_hunter
					}
				}
				add_trait = lifestyle_hunter
			}
			add_random_tiered_trait_track_xp_effect = {
				TRAIT = lifestyle_hunter
				TRACK = hunter
				LEVEL_1 = yes
				LEVEL_3 = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

################################
# AI Kingsguard Maintenance Events
# 9001 - 9999
# by Badger
################################
agot_saltguard.9000 = {
	#Big Maintenance Check
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		ruler_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
		any_living_saltguard = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_lord_commander
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_6
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_1
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_2
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_3
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_4
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_5
					}
					NOT = {
						exists = cp:saltguard_6
					}
				}
			}
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.9002
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					exists = cp:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
			}
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.9001
		}
	}
}

# AI Dead Lord Commander
agot_saltguard.9001 = {
	# AI Dead Lord Commander
	hidden = yes
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_1
			}
			cp:saltguard_1 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_2
			}
			cp:saltguard_2 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_3
			}
			cp:saltguard_3 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_4
			}
			cp:saltguard_4 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_5
			}
			cp:saltguard_5 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_6
			}
			cp:saltguard_6 = {
				add_to_list = lord_commander_candidates
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = lord_commander_candidates
			order_by = {
				value = 0
				max = 1
				add = {
					value = prowess
					multiply = 2
				}
				if = {
					#Extra for important lordly fams
					limit = {
						any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
							is_landed = yes
							highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
						}
					}
					add = 20
				}
				# More Likely to pick a Lord Commander they like
				if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 80
						}
					}
					add = 40
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 50
						}
					}
					add = 30
				}
				else_if = {
					limit = {
						opinion = {
							target = root
							value >= 30
						}
					}
					add = 15
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = new_lord_commander
		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:new_lord_commander = {
			add_character_flag = can_fire_saltguard
		}
		fire_councillor = scope:new_lord_commander
		save_scope_as = king
		agot_assign_saltguard_lord_commander_effect = {
			COMMANDER = scope:new_lord_commander
			KING = scope:king
		}
		scope:new_lord_commander = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = ROOT
				modifier = grateful_opinion
				opinion = 20
			}
			remove_character_flag = can_fire_saltguard
		}
	}
}


scripted_trigger ai_kg_assignment_trigger = {
	prowess >= 15
	can_be_saltguard_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	has_trait = education_martial_prowess
	NOR = {
		has_trait = saltguard
		any_heir_title = { #AI don't use primary heirs
			exists = this
			place_in_line_of_succession = {
				target = prev
				value == 1
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.9002 = {
	# Dead Kingsguard Member AI
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_6
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = king
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					can_be_saltguard_trigger = {
						COURT_OWNER = scope:king
					}
					top_liege = root
					prowess >= 15 # don't assign complete shitters
					has_trait = education_martial_prowess # somebody with a sword trait for fuck sake
					NOR = {
						has_trait = saltguard
						AND = {
							any_heir_title = { #AI don't use primary heirs
								exists = this
								place_in_line_of_succession = {
									target = prev
									value == 1
								}
							}
							NOT = { #Unless they're specifically training for the Kingsguard
								has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
							}
						}
					}
				}
				add_to_list = potential_saltguard
			}
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_saltguard
			limit = {
				can_be_saltguard_trigger = {
					COURT_OWNER = scope:king
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					#Being good at swords
					add = {
						value = prowess
						multiply = 2
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#Grab cool traits plz
					OR = {
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_3
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_4
						has_trait = education_martial_prowess_5
						has_trait = lifestyle_blademaster
					}
					add = 50
				}
				modifier = { #Appoint your relatives who are training
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						this = root
					}
					has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
					add = 300
				}
				modifier = { #Appoint your spouse's relatives who are training
					trigger = { exists = root.primary_spouse }
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						this = root.primary_spouse
					}
					has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
					add = 300
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_empire
					}
					add = 200
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_kingdom
					}
					add = 150
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_duchy
					}
					add = 100
				}
				modifier = {
					#Important Lordly relatives is a huge plus to grab notable characters
					any_close_or_extended_family_member = {
						is_landed = yes
						primary_title.tier = tier_county
					}
					add = 50
				}
				opinion_modifier = {
					# More likely to pick someone they like
					opinion_target = root
					multiplier = 2
				}
				modifier = {
					#dont pick people you hate
					OR = {
						has_relation_rival = root
						has_relation_nemesis = root
						has_relation_potential_rival = root
					}
					factor = 0.1
				}
				modifier = {
					#Less chance of appointing heathens
					factor = 0.2
					NOT = {
						faith = root.faith
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#Prejudice against Lowborn - AI should prefer nobles
					factor = 0.1
					is_lowborn = yes
				}
				modifier = {
					# Dont appoint randoms when there's a trainee available
					factor = 0
					any_in_list = {
						list = potential_saltguard
						has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
					}
					NOT = {
						has_character_modifier = training_for_saltguard
					}
				}
				modifier = {
					#if they can't be KG don't try and assign them stupid ass AI
					factor = 0
					NOT = {
						can_be_saltguard_trigger = {
							COURT_OWNER = scope:king
						}
					}
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = saltguard_candidate
		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:king = {
			add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_candidate
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.1008
		}
		scope:saltguard_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.1006
		}
	}
}
agot_saltguard.9003 = {
	# Stop moronic KG leaving
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		has_trait = saltguard
		scope:old_employer = {
			is_landed = yes
			this = top_liege
			ruler_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
		}
		NOT = {
			has_character_flag = coming_home
		}
		NOT = { is_ruler = yes }
	}
	immediate = {
		scope:old_employer = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = saltguard_candidate
		}
		scope:old_employer = {
			root = {
				add_character_flag = coming_home
			}
			add_courtier ?= root
			root = {
				remove_character_flag = coming_home
			}
		}
		scope:saltguard_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.1006
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.9004 = {
	# Remove KG variables to prevent them rising from the grave if title is recreated
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		scope:landed_title = {
			title_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		scope:landed_title = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_1
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_2
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_3
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_4
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_5
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					exists = var:saltguard_6
				}
				remove_variable = saltguard_6
			}
		}
		every_councillor = {
			limit = {
				is_saltguard_trigger = yes
				has_trait = saltguard
			}
			remove_trait = saltguard
			agot_saltguard_destroy_artifacts = yes
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:landed_title = title:e_the_iron_islands
				exists = title:d_saltguard.holder
			}
			title:d_saltguard.holder = {
				destroy_title = title:d_saltguard
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.9005 = {
	# Kingsguard on parole now get a job :)
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		has_trait = saltguard
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		top_liege = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = saltguard_candidate
		}
	}
	option = {
		scope:saltguard_candidate = {
			trigger_event = agot_saltguard.1006
		}
	}
}

#Grab lost saltguard send them home
agot_saltguard.9007 = {
	hidden = yes
	trigger = {
		ruler_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
	}
	immediate = {
		random_held_title = {
			limit = {
				title_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = saltguard_title
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
					is_alive = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
						NOT = {
							employer ?= root
							is_ruler = yes
						}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_lord_commander
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_lord_commander
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_1
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_1
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_1
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_2
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_2
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_2
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_3
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_3
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_3
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_4
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_4
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_4
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_5
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_5
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_5
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_6
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_6
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_6
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6
				}
			}
		}
		title:d_saltguard.holder ?= {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_government = saltguard_government } }
				change_government = saltguard_government
			}
		}
		#Succession Display
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:saltguard_lord_commander
				cp:saltguard_lord_commander = {
					scope:saltguard_title = title:d_saltguard
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_1
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_2
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_3
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_4
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_5
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title = {
						exists = var:saltguard_6
					}
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
						is_alive = yes
					}
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
					add_to_list = saltguard_successor
				}
			}
			ordered_in_list = {
				list = saltguard_successor
				order_by = prowess
				max = 1
				save_scope_as = saltguard_successor
			}
			cp:saltguard_lord_commander = {
				set_designated_heir_unsafe = scope:saltguard_successor
			}
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.9008 = {
	# agot_on_title_gain_kingsguard = { # This only works if the previous owner has a title to fall back on, and thus, has a court
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		ruler_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
	}

	immediate = {
		random_held_title = {
			limit = {
				title_has_saltguard_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = saltguard_title
		}
		if = { #Ensure Kingsguard title is a vassal
			limit = {
				has_title = title:e_the_iron_islands
				NOT = { has_title = title:d_saltguard }
				exists = title:d_saltguard.holder
			}
			create_title_and_vassal_change = {
				type = swear_fealty
				save_scope_as = change
				add_claim_on_loss = no
			}
			title:d_saltguard.holder = {
				change_liege = {
					liege = root
					change = scope:change
				}
			}
			resolve_title_and_vassal_change = scope:change
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
					is_alive = yes
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
						is_ruler = no
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_lord_commander
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_lord_commander
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_lord_commander
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_1
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_1
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_1
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_1
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_2
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_2
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_2
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_2
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_3
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_3
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_3
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_3
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_4
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_4
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_4
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_4
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_5
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_5
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_5
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_5
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:saltguard_title = {
					exists = var:saltguard_6
				}
				scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
					is_alive = yes
				}

			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
						NOT = { employer ?= root}
					}
				}
				add_courtier ?= scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6 = {
							has_council_position = saltguard_6
						}
					}
				}
				assign_councillor_type = {
					type = saltguard_6
					target = scope:saltguard_title.var:saltguard_6
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

scripted_effect kg_decision_list_builder = {
	scope:title_with_kg.var:saltguard_$NUM$ ?= {
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = { has_character_flag = agot_is_at_unknown_place }
			}
			add_to_list = kg_decision_list
		}
	}
}

agot_saltguard.9100 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.9100.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.9100.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = scope:loser
	trigger = {
		scope:title_with_kg = {
			has_variable = {
				name = saltguard_1
				name = saltguard_2
				name = saltguard_3
				name = saltguard_4
				name = saltguard_5
				name = saltguard_6
				name = saltguard_lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 1 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 2 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 3 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 4 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 5 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = 6 }
		kg_decision_list_builder = { NUM = lord_commander }
		add_character_flag = {
			flag = skip_kg_replacement_event_flag
			days = 14
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.9100.a
		trigger_event = agot_saltguard.9101
	}
}
agot_saltguard.9101 = {
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.9101.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.9101.desc
	override_background = {
		reference = battlefield
	}
	theme = war
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = marshal
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:right_portrait_kg animation = beg
	}
	widget = {
		is_shown = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		gui = "agot_mw_kg_removal_selection"
		container = "custom_widgets_container"
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = no
			}
			every_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				root = {
					add_to_variable_list = {
						name = kg_decision_widget_list
						target = prev
					}
				}
			}
			random_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				save_scope_as = right_portrait_kg
			}
		}
		else = {
			ordered_in_list = {
				list = kg_decision_list
				order_by = "opinion(root)"
				save_scope_as = kg
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.9101.a
		trigger = {
			is_ai = no
		}
		every_in_list = {
			variable = kg_removes_list
			custom_tooltip = agot_saltguard.9101.a_tt
			hidden_effect = {
				agot_remove_saltguard_effect = { KINGSGUARD = this }
				root = {
					imprison = {
						target = prev
						type = dungeon
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.9101.b
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		agot_remove_saltguard_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:kg }
		imprison = {
			target = scope:kg
			type = dungeon
		}
		scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
		ai_chance = {
			base = 90
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.9101.c
		trigger = {
			is_ai = yes
		}
		scope:kg = {
			add_opinion = {
				target = root
				modifier = was_spared
				opinion = 20
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 10
			opinion_modifier = {
				opinion_target = scope:kg
			}
		}
	}
	after = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = yes
			}
			scope:kg = { remove_from_list = kg_decision_list }
			if = {
				limit = {
					list_size:kg_decision_list > 0
				}
				clear_saved_scope = kg
				trigger_event = agot_saltguard.9101
			}
		}
		else = {
			clear_variable_list = kg_removes_list
			clear_variable_list = kg_decision_widget_list
		}
	}
}

##########
# A Kingsguard is found dead outside a brothel! - Owen Bush
# Badger
#########
scripted_trigger saltguard_3017_saltguard_candidate_trigger = {
	is_available_adult = yes
	is_saltguard_trigger = yes
	is_male = yes #Can't cut off a penis that ain't there
	OR = { #Would visit a brothel
		has_trait = lustful
		has_trait = rakish
		#has_trait = lifestyle_reveler - makes sense but EVERYONE ends up with this stupid fucking trait somehow so makes the pool far too wide
	}
	NOR = {
		has_trait = celibate
		has_trait = chaste
		has_trait = eunuch
		has_trait = beardless_eunuch
	}
	ai_compassion <= high_negative_compassion #Cruel
}

agot_saltguard.3017 = { # Reddit's favourite event
	type = character_event
	title = agot_saltguard.3017.t
	desc = agot_saltguard.3017.desc
	theme = martial_chivalry_focus
	override_background = {
		reference = tavern
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:eunuch_saltguard
		animation = poison
		outfit_tags = { no_clothes }
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = worry
	}
	trigger = {
		any_councillor = {
			saltguard_3017_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		set_variable = {
			name = had_saltguard_side_effect
			value = yes
			days = kingsguard_side_effect_cooldown			# 365 days
		}
		random_councillor = {
			limit = {
				saltguard_3017_saltguard_candidate_trigger = yes
			}
			save_scope_as = eunuch_saltguard
		}
		scope:eunuch_saltguard = {
			add_trait = eunuch_1
			death = {
				death_reason = death_suffocate_on_cock
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_saltguard.3017.a
		if = {
			limit = {
				capital_county.culture = { has_cultural_tradition = tradition_city_keepers }
			}
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = high_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			capital_county = {
				add_county_modifier = {
					modifier = medium_investment_in_revolt_modifier
					years = 15
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

##### winter_wolf (e_the_north) #####
namespace = agot_winter_wolf

################################
# Kingsguard Maintenance and Appointment Events
# 1000 - 1999
# by Badger
################################

agot_winter_wolf.1000 = { #Kingsguard Death Maintenance Event
	hidden = yes

	trigger = {
		NOT = {
			title:e_the_north = {
				has_variable = kingslanding_exploding
			}
		}
		OR = {
			has_trait = winter_wolf
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_lord_commander
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_1
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_2
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_3
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_4
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_5
			has_council_position = winter_wolf_6
		}
		top_liege = {
			ruler_has_winter_wolf_trigger = yes
		}
		NOT = { #surpress the notification in specific events
			top_liege = {
				has_character_flag = replacing_winter_wolf
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		save_scope_as = dead_winter_wolf
		agot_remove_winter_wolf_effect = { KINGSGUARD = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
	}
}

scripted_trigger new_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
scripted_trigger new_highborn_kg_trigger = {
	any_courtier_or_guest = {
		prowess >= 20
		highborn_winter_wolf_candidate = yes
		can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
	}
}
agot_winter_wolf.1001 = { # Standard KG Member Death / Removal
	type = character_event
	title = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.t
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.fallback.t
		}
	}
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = { # Comment on Prowess
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf
					scope:dead_winter_wolf.prowess >= 35
				}
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.talented
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf
					scope:dead_winter_wolf.prowess >= 20
				}
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.suitable
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf
					scope:dead_winter_wolf.prowess >= 10
				}
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.passing
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf
					scope:dead_winter_wolf.prowess < 10
				}
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.unsuitable
			}
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.desc.end
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1001.fallback.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	override_background = {
		trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
		reference = temple
	}
	left_portrait = {
		character = scope:king
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
			animation = sadness
		}
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:removed_kg
		triggered_animation = {
			trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
			animation = personality_zealous
		}
		animation = personality_cynical
	}
	lower_center_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				scope:lord_commander = scope:removed_kg
			}
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		if = {
			limit = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
			play_music_cue = mx_cue_death
		}
		root = {
			save_scope_as = king
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander
			}
			cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander = {
				save_scope_as = lord_commander
			}
		}
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Greatest Knights in all the realm
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1001.a
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_winter_wolf.1001.a.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				OR = {
					any_vassal_or_below = {
						primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
						new_kg_trigger = yes
					}
					new_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_winter_wolf.1002
			days = { 10 20 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_winter_wolf.1001.a.tt
	}
	option = { #Bring me the Sons of Powerful Lords
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1001.b
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = agot_winter_wolf.1001.b.tt # Avoid "consider using a custom_tooltip" warning
				any_vassal_or_below = {
					primary_title = { tier >= tier_county }
					is_powerful_vassal = yes
					new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
		trigger_event = {
			id = agot_winter_wolf.1003
			days = { 30 60 }
		}
		custom_tooltip = agot_winter_wolf.1001.b.tt
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1001.c
		custom_tooltip = agot_winter_wolf.1001.c.tt
	}
}

agot_winter_wolf.1002 = { # Greatest Knights
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winter_wolf.1002.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1002.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1002.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		desc = agot_winter_wolf.1002.desc.end
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_6
			}
		}
		any_living_winter_wolf = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_winter_wolf
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander = {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20
				can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_winter_wolf
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_winter_wolf
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				list_size = {
					name = potential_winter_wolf
					value = 0
				}
			}
			create_character = {
				template = agot_potential_kingsguard_character
				location = root.capital_province
				save_scope_as = fallback_winter_wolf
			}
			scope:fallback_winter_wolf = {
				add_to_list = potential_winter_wolf
			}
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			position = 0
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_1
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			position = 1
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_2
		}
		ordered_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			position = 2
			order_by = prowess
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1004
		}
	}
	option = {
		#Never Mind
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.d
		custom_tooltip = agot_winter_wolf.1002.d.tt
	}
	after = {
		remove_character_flag = choosing_winter_wolf
		every_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			remove_from_list = potential_winter_wolf
		}
	}
}

agot_winter_wolf.1003 = { # Powerful Lordly Scions who will auto-accept
	type = character_event
	title = agot_winter_wolf.1003.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:dead_winter_wolf }
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1003.desc.intro
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1003.fallback.desc.intro
		}
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					list_size = {
						name = potential_winter_wolf
						value = 0
					}
				}
				desc = agot_winter_wolf.1003.desc.no_options
			}
			desc = agot_winter_wolf.1003.desc.end
		}
	}
	theme = court
	left_portrait = {
		character = root
		animation = personality_callous
	}
	right_portrait = {
		character = scope:lord_commander
		animation = personality_content
	}
	lower_left_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
	lower_center_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
	lower_right_portrait = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3
	trigger = {
		exists = cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander
		OR = {
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_1
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_2
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_3
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_4
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_5
			}
			NOT = {
				exists = cp:winter_wolf_6
			}
		}
		any_living_winter_wolf = {
			#Check for the 7 to stop appointing to replace guys in prison
			top_liege = root
			count < 3
		}
	}
	immediate = {
		add_character_flag = choosing_winter_wolf
		play_music_cue = mx_cue_positive_effect
		cp:winter_wolf_lord_commander ?= {
			save_scope_as = lord_commander
		}
		every_courtier_or_guest = {
			limit = {
				prowess >= 20
				highborn_winter_wolf_candidate = yes
				can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
			}
			add_to_list = potential_winter_wolf
		}
		every_vassal_or_below = {
			limit = {
				primary_title = {
					tier >= tier_county
				}
				is_powerful_vassal = yes
				new_highborn_kg_trigger = yes
			}
			every_courtier_or_guest = {
				limit = {
					prowess >= 20
					highborn_winter_wolf_candidate = yes
					can_be_winter_wolf_trigger = { COURT_OWNER = scope:king }
				}
				add_to_list = potential_winter_wolf
			}
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_winter_wolf
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_1
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_winter_wolf
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_2
		}
		random_in_list = {
			list = potential_winter_wolf
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_character_flag = winter_wolf_position_rejected
					has_trait = winter_wolf
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
					this = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
				}
			}
			weight = {
				base = 1
				modifier = {
					add = prowess
				}
				modifier = {
					add = 500
					has_character_modifier = training_for_winter_wolf
				}
			}
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate_3
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.a
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1006
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1008
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.b
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1006
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1008
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.c
		trigger = {
			exists = scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3 = {
			trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1006
			save_scope_as = winter_wolf_candidate
		}
		trigger_event = agot_winter_wolf.1008
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		trigger = {
			list_size = {
				name = potential_winter_wolf
				value > 0
			}
		}
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.d
		custom_tooltip = agot_winter_wolf.1002.d.tt
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_1 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_2 ?= {
			random_parent = {
				limit = {
					is_landed = yes
				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion
					target = root
					opinion = -20
				}
			}
		}
		scope:winter_wolf_candidate_3 ?= {
			random_parent = {

				}
				add_opinion = {
					modifier = disappointed_opinion

					opinion = -20

	option = {

		}
		name = agot_winter_wolf.1002.e

			remove_from_list = potential_winter_wolf
		}
	}
